title: Cortical and white matter myelination proceed in concert during early infancy
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The infant brain undergoes rapid myelination that is critical for healthy brain function. This development has been characterized for gray and white matter independently, but the link between gray and white matter myelination remains unexplored. To close this knowledge gap, we evaluated two complementary myelin-sensitive imaging metrics: Large-scale (N = 273) T1w/T2w and quantitative (N = 21) R1 data. Automated software was employed to identify 26 white matter bundles and map their cortical terminations, before evaluating T1w/T2w and R1 development shortly after birth. Here we show that for both metrics mean values as well as developmental slopes are correlated across tissues. The synchrony of brain T1w/T2w is impacted by postmenstrual age and prematurity, whereas inter-individual differences in this synchrony predict motor outcomes at 17 − 25 months of age. As T1w/T2w and R1 are associated with myelin content, our results reveal an intricate relationship between gray and white matter myelination.
title_zh: 婴儿早期皮质和白质髓鞘形成同步进行
abstract_zh: 婴儿大脑经历快速髓鞘形成，这对于健康的大脑功能至关重要。灰质和白质的这种发展是独立的，但灰质和白质髓鞘形成之间的联系仍未被探索。为了弥补这一知识差距，我们评估了两个互补的髓磷脂敏感成像指标：大规模（N = 273）T1w/T2w 和定量（N = 21）R1 数据。在出生后不久评估 T1w/T2w 和 R1 发育之前，采用自动化软件识别 26 个白质束并绘制它们的皮质末端图。在这里，我们表明，这两个指标的平均值和发育斜率在组织之间是相关的。大脑 T1w/T2w 的同步性受到经后年龄和早产的影响，而这种同步性的个体间差异可以预测 17 – 25 个月龄时的运动结果。由于 T1w/T2w 和 R1 与髓磷脂含量相关，因此我们的结果揭示了灰质和白质髓鞘形成之间的复杂关系。

title: Conversion of all polyester units to amines: Ruthenium-catalyzed, acid-assisted hydrogenative amination
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Herein, we report an efficient strategy for upcycling waste polyesters into a range of primary, secondary, and tertiary diamines and amines via ruthenium-catalyzed, acid-assisted hydrogenative amination. To our knowledge, this previously unknown methodology can convert all structural units of end-of-life polyesters into corresponding (di)amines. The protocol demonstrates excellent applicability by successfully transforming even the most challenging real-world polyester wastes containing diverse impurities, achieving high yields of up to 98%. Mechanistic investigations elucidate two distinct reaction pathways: The acyl moiety undergoes transformation via a hydrogenation-condensation-hydrogenation sequence, while an acid-assisted hydrogen-borrowing pathway converts the alcohol moiety. This study provides fundamental insights into concurrent hydrogenation and dehydrogenation processes within a unified catalytic system.
title_zh: 所有聚酯单元转化为胺：钌催化、酸辅助氢化胺化
abstract_zh: 在此，我们报告了一种通过钌催化、酸辅助氢化胺化将废聚酯升级改造为一系列伯、仲和叔二胺和胺的有效策略。据我们所知，这种以前未知的方法可以将报废聚酯的所有结构单元转化为相应的（二）胺。该协议展示了出色的适用性，成功地转化了现实世界中最具挑战性的含有多种杂质的聚酯废物，实现了高达 98% 的高产率。机理研究阐明了两种不同的反应途径：酰基部分通过氢化-缩合-氢化序列进行转化，而酸辅助的借氢途径则转化醇部分。这项研究为统一催化系统内并发的加氢和脱氢过程提供了基本见解。

title: Transforming global water cycle observations via synergistic AI and remote sensing
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Rapid shifts in terrestrial water cycle and water-related disasters due to climate change challenge the capability of remote sensing observation. Current models that rely on region-specific empirical parameters and multistage workflows fail to robustly handle complex and accelerated water cycle with high spatiotemporal resolutions. Increasing parameter complexity for fine-scale representation under various terrestrial conditions becomes prohibitive. To address these limitations, we present bidirectional encoder representations from transformers for hydrology (BERTH), an end-to-end artificial intelligence (AI) framework for global water cycle monitoring at 30-meter and daily scale, directly transforming remote sensing radiance to evapotranspiration, precipitation, soil moisture, and runoff. As a transformative paradigm for quantitative Earth science, BERTH trained on global datasets precisely captures spatiotemporal dynamics across diverse conditions, surpassing existing geophysical models in accuracy. Embodying the synergistic integration of AI and remote sensing, BERTH offers a transformative platform that supports next-generation investigations into global water resources and Earth system dynamics.
title_zh: 通过协同人工智能和遥感改变全球水循环观测
abstract_zh: 气候变化导致的陆地水循环和水灾害的快速变化对遥感观测能力提出了挑战。当前依赖于特定区域经验参数和多级工作流程的模型无法以高时空分辨率稳健地处理复杂且加速的水循环。在各种地面条件下增加精细尺度表示的参数复杂性变得令人望而却步。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了来自水文学变压器 (BERTH) 的双向编码器表示，这是一种端到端人工智能 (AI) 框架，用于 30 米和日尺度的全球水循环监测，直接将遥感辐射率转换为蒸散量、降水、土壤湿度和径流。作为定量地球科学的变革性范式，BERTH 在全球数据集上进行训练，可以精确捕获不同条件下的时空动态，其准确性超越了现有的地球物理模型。 BERTH 体现了人工智能和遥感的协同集成，提供了一个变革性平台，支持对全球水资源和地球系统动力学的下一代研究。

title: A programmable bifunctional flavoenzyme for direct amine-to-ester conversion
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
The unification of mechanistically distinct oxidative transformations within a single enzyme active site represents a long-standing challenge in biocatalysis. In particular, flavin-dependent oxidative deamination and Baeyer-Villiger oxidation have remained evolutionarily and mechanistically segregated, raising fundamental questions as to whether their catalytic cycles can be coherently integrated without mutual interference. Here, we report a bifunctional ancestral flavoenzyme, AncFO-221, reconstructed using a function-oriented ancestral sequence reconstruction strategy, which enables direct amine-to-ester conversion within a single active site. Combined experimental and computational analyses reveal a unified catalytic framework in which histidine-assisted proton and hydride transfer during amine oxidation is intrinsically coupled to C
                    4a
                    -peroxyflavin–mediated oxygen insertion, establishing a continuous amine oxidation-Baeyer–Villiger oxidation (AO-BVO) reaction cycle rather than a fortuitous cascade. Guided by this mechanistic unity, modular protein engineering produced an optimized variant, M15, exhibiting an ~18-fold enhancement in catalytic efficiency, near-complete suppression of reductive side reactions, and lactone yields up to 93%. Notably, the engineered enzyme displays programmable and unconventional regioselectivity, preferentially migrating weakly migratory groups across structurally diverse amines, thereby overriding the classical Baeyer-Villiger migratory rule. This study demonstrates that ancestral reconstruction combined with mechanism-guided evolution can merge evolutionarily segregated chemistries into a single, tunable catalytic platform, providing a generalizable blueprint for the design of multistep oxidative biocatalysts.
title_zh: 用于直接将胺转化为酯的可编程双功能黄素酶
abstract_zh:
在单个酶活性位点内统一机械上不同的氧化转化是生物催化中长期存在的挑战。特别是，黄素依赖性氧化脱氨和拜尔-维利格氧化在进化和机制上仍然是分离的，这提出了一个基本问题：它们的催化循环是否可以在不相互干扰的情况下连贯地整合。在这里，我们报告了一种双功能祖先黄素酶AncFO-221，它使用面向功能的祖先序列重建策略进行重建，该策略能够在单个活性位点内直接将胺转化为酯。结合实验和计算分析揭示了一个统一的催化框架，其中胺氧化过程中组氨酸辅助的质子和氢化物转移本质上与 C 耦合
                    4a
                    -过氧黄素介导的氧插入，建立连续的胺氧化-Baeyer-Villiger氧化（AO-BVO）反应循环，而不是偶然的级联。在这种机制统一的指导下，模块化蛋白质工程产生了一种优化的变体 M15，催化效率提高了约 18 倍，还原副反应几乎完全抑制，内酯产率高达 93%。值得注意的是，该工程酶表现出可编程和非常规的区域选择性，优先在结构多样的胺之间迁移弱迁移基团，从而推翻了经典的Baeyer-Villiger迁移规则。这项研究表明祖先重建梳理

title: Global impacts of drifting fish aggregating devices on marine protected areas
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Protected areas are a critical component of efforts to reverse biodiversity loss by 2050. In the ocean, free-drifting fish aggregating devices (dFADs) are released in large numbers by industrial purse seine fishing companies to help catch tuna. These devices can enter marine protected areas (MPAs) undetected, potentially leading to wildlife entanglement, plastic pollution, and habitat degradation. Here we investigate processes by which dFADs may compromise MPA objectives and assess the burden they put on existing MPAs. By analyzing drift, strandings, and expert interview data, we show that dFADs have likely interacted with 53% of the global MPA network by area and stranded in 174 protected areas, which are home to at least 490 at-risk species. While recent improvements to dFAD design should reduce harm to wildlife, our findings suggest that improved regulation, transparency, and industry accountability are required to mitigate additional effects on MPAs, especially around documented hotspots in the central Pacific, western Indian Ocean, and Caribbean.
title_zh: 漂流鱼聚集装置对海洋保护区的全球影响
abstract_zh: 保护区是到 2050 年扭转生物多样性丧失的努力的重要组成部分。在海洋中，工业围网捕鱼公司大量释放自由漂流集鱼装置 (dFAD)，以帮助捕获金枪鱼。这些设备可以在不被发现的情况下进入海洋保护区 (MPA)，可能导致野生动物纠缠、塑料污染和栖息地退化。在这里，我们调查 dFAD 可能损害 MPA 目标的过程，并评估它们给现有 MPA 带来的负担。通过分析漂流、搁浅和专家访谈数据，我们发现 dFAD 可能与全球 MPA 网络中 53% 的地区发生了相互作用，并搁浅在 174 个保护区，这些保护区是至少 490 个濒危物种的家园。虽然最近对 dFAD 设计的改进应该会减少对野生动物的伤害，但我们的研究结果表明，需要改进监管、透明度和行业问责制，以减轻对海洋保护区的额外影响，特别是在中太平洋、西印度洋和加勒比海地区记录的热点地区。

title: A conserved in-frame stop codon acts as a multipotent defense mechanism in alphaviruses
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Most alphaviruses maintain an in-frame opal stop codon that interrupts their nonstructural polyprotein (nsP) ORF between nsP3 and nsP4 in both vertebrate and insect hosts. We show that the nsP3 opal stop codon confers a replicative advantage to Sindbis virus (SINV) in RNAi-competent
                    Aedes
                    cells and mosquitoes but not in RNAi-deficient cells or mosquitoes. Mutation of the opal stop codon delays processing of the viral nsP polyprotein, disrupts viral replication spherule integrity, and renders viral RNA susceptible to Dicer 2 cleavage, resulting in higher antiviral siRNA responses against SINV. Similarly, these defects caused by opal codon mutations lead to increased viral RNA detection and enhanced immune signaling in vertebrate cells. Thus, a single stop codon in alphaviruses mediates a multipotent viral strategy to evade innate immune defenses across diverse hosts.
title_zh: 保守的框内终止密码子在甲病毒中充当多能防御机制
abstract_zh:
大多数甲病毒都维持一个框内蛋白石终止密码子，该密码子会中断脊椎动物和昆虫宿主中 nsP3 和 nsP4 之间的非结构多蛋白 (nsP) ORF。我们证明 nsP3 蛋白石终止密码子赋予 Sindbis 病毒 (SINV) 在 RNAi 能力中的复制优势
                    伊蚊
                    细胞和蚊子中，但不在 RNAi 缺陷细胞或蚊子中。蛋白石终止密码子的突变会延迟病毒 nsP 多蛋白的加工，破坏病毒复制球的完整性，并使病毒 RNA 容易受到 Dicer 2 裂解的影响，从而导致针对 SINV 的抗病毒 siRNA 反应更高。同样，蛋白石密码子突变引起的这些缺陷会增加病毒 RNA 检测并增强脊椎动物细胞中的免疫信号传导。因此，甲病毒中的单个终止密码子介导多能病毒策略，以逃避不同宿主的先天免疫防御。

title: A ∼0.5 Myr perturbation of carbon and mercury cycles during the Middle Triassic biotic radiation
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: The Anisian Stage (Middle Triassic) marks a pivotal interval for biotic recovery following the Permian-Triassic mass extinction, yet its environmental drivers remain poorly understood. This study presents carbon isotopes, mercury (Hg) concentrations, and Hg isotope data from Anisian (mainly Pelsonian substage) marine and terrestrial sections across the Tethys. Our results reveal a widespread Hg enrichment event that is synchronous with the Pelsonian negative carbon isotope excursion (PENCIE). Hg isotopic compositions support an origin from enhanced regional volcanism, coupled with contemporaneous terrestrial input. New high-precision zircon U-Pb ages (244.200 ± 0.037 Ma and 243.451 ± 0.049 Ma), integrated with chemostratigraphic and biostratigraphic data, constrain the duration of the PENCIE to ∼0.5 Myr. This interval coincided with major biodiversification, revealing that recovery occurred alongside environmental perturbations rather than in stable conditions as traditionally thought. These global disturbances in carbon and mercury cycles, linked to volcanism and terrestrial input, likely accelerated Middle Triassic biotic recovery.
title_zh: 中三叠世生物辐射期间碳和汞循环的~0.5 Myr扰动
abstract_zh: 安尼阶阶段（中三叠世）标志着二叠纪-三叠纪大规模灭绝之后生物恢复的关键时期，但其环境驱动因素仍然知之甚少。本研究提供了特提斯海安尼阶（主要是佩尔逊阶）海洋和陆地剖面的碳同位素、汞 (Hg) 浓度和汞同位素数据。我们的结果揭示了与佩尔森负碳同位素偏移（PENCIE）同步的广泛的汞富集事件。汞同位素组成支持起源于增强的区域火山活动，加上同时期的陆地输入。新的高精度锆石 U-Pb 年龄（244.200 ± 0.037 Ma 和 243.451 ± 0.049 Ma）与化学地层学和生物地层学数据相结合，将 PENCIE 的持续时间限制在~0.5 Myr。这一时期与主要的生物多样性相一致，表明恢复是在环境扰动的同时发生的，而不是传统认为的在稳定条件下发生的。这些与火山活动和陆地输入有关的碳和汞循环的全球扰动可能加速了中三叠世生物的恢复。

title: Noninvasive whole-brain imaging of glymphatic dynamics
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Cerebrospinal fluid circulation through the glymphatic system plays a crucial role in removing metabolic waste from the central nervous system. However, the mechanism underlying the brain-wide glymphatic dynamics is not yet fully understood, in part due to the lack of glymphatic imaging technologies on deep brains. Here, we report a hybrid imaging technology that integrates three-dimensional photoacoustic tomography and ultrasound localization microscopy (3D-PAULM), enhanced by a photoacoustic dye with strong optical absorption in the second near-infrared window (NIR-II). 3D-PAULM allows for continuous, noninvasive, whole-brain imaging in mice through intact skull, providing superresolution mapping of the brain vasculature and highly sensitive tracing of the NIR-II dye in the glymphatic system. Using 3D-PAULM, we investigated the glymphatic function impaired by ischemic stroke, aging, and anesthesia. Our results provide insights into glymphatic transport under various physiological as well as pathological conditions and establish 3D-PAULM as a valuable tool for preclinical glymphatic research.
title_zh: 类淋巴动力学的无创全脑成像
abstract_zh: 通过类淋巴系统的脑脊液循环在清除中枢神经系统代谢废物方面起着至关重要的作用。然而，全脑类淋巴动力学的机制尚未完全了解，部分原因是缺乏深部大脑的类淋巴成像技术。在这里，我们报告了一种混合成像技术，该技术集成了三维光声断层扫描和超声定位显微镜（3D-PAULM），并通过在第二近红外窗口（NIR-II）中具有强光吸收的光声染料增强。 3D-PAULM 允许通过完整的头骨对小鼠进行连续、无创、全脑成像，提供脑血管系统的超分辨率绘图以及对类淋巴系统中 NIR-II 染料的高灵敏度追踪。使用 3D-PAULM，我们研究了因缺血性中风、衰老和麻醉而受损的类淋巴功能。我们的结果提供了对各种生理和病理条件下类淋巴运输的见解，并将 3D-PAULM 确立为临床前类淋巴研究的宝贵工具。

title: Haplotype-resolved methylomes reveal parent-of-origin DNA methylation imbalance in autism spectrum disorder
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Epigenetic dysregulation plays an essential role in autism spectrum disorder (ASD), but the parent-of-origin effects (POEs) of DNA methylation remain unknown. Here, we applied PacBio HiFi sequencing with haplotype-phased methylation profiling in 124 individuals (31 ASD quartets) to systematically dissect POE-dependent methylation. Comparative analysis of phased methylomes between probands and unaffected siblings identified 114 paternal- and 106 maternal-specific differential methylated cytosines (DMCs), 45 and 46 differential methylated regions (DMRs), and 2425 and 2693 methylation outliers (MOs), respectively. These POE methylation alterations were enriched in ASD-relevant gene categories but exhibited distinct genomic distributions and functional pathways between parental haplotypes. Furthermore, genome-wide parent-of-origin DMR analysis identified 443 allele-specific methylation (ASM) regions, from which we detected 34 differential expression ASMs and 62 ASM outliers, showing pronounced enrichment within PWS/AS locus and ASD-associated genes. Collectively, this study provides a comprehensive evidence of pervasive POE-dependent methylation imbalance and aberrant ASM at imprinting regions underlying ASD pathogenesis, offering insights into epigenetic mechanisms of complex neurodevelopmental disorders.
title_zh: 单倍型解析的甲基化揭示自闭症谱系障碍中亲本 DNA 甲基化不平衡
abstract_zh: 表观遗传失调在自闭症谱系障碍 (ASD) 中发挥着重要作用，但 DNA 甲基化的亲本效应 (POE) 仍不清楚。在这里，我们对 124 个个体（31 个 ASD 四重体）应用 PacBio HiFi 测序和单倍型定相甲基化分析，系统地剖析 POE 依赖性甲基化。对先证者和未患病兄弟姐妹之间的阶段性甲基化组进行比较分析，分别鉴定出 114 个父亲特异性差异甲基化胞嘧啶 (DMC)、106 个母亲特异性差异甲基化胞嘧啶 (DMC)、45 个和 46 个差异甲基化区域 (DMR)、以及 2425 个和 2693 个甲基化异常值 (MO)。这些 POE 甲基化改变在 ASD 相关基因类别中丰富，但在亲本单倍型之间表现出不同的基因组分布和功能途径。此外，全基因组亲本 DMR 分析确定了 443 个等位基因特异性甲基化 (ASM) 区域，从中我们检测到 34 个差异表达 ASM 和 62 个 ASM 异常值，显示 PWS/AS 基因座和 ASD 相关基因的显着富集。总的来说，这项研究提供了 ASD 发病机制中印记区域普遍存在的 POE 依赖性甲基化失衡和异常 ASM 的全面证据，为复杂神经发育障碍的表观遗传机制提供了见解。

title: Metaceramic enables ultrahigh-temperature record rectification and programmable 3D thermal control
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Thermal rectification enables asymmetric heat flow and offers transformative potential for thermal management under extreme environments, yet its practical development has been constrained by a fundamental trade-off between high-temperature stability and nonlinear thermal response. Conventional rectifiers face intrinsic limitations, with operating temperatures below 900 kelvin and rectification ratios under 3.5. Here, we present a metaceramic, a monolithic metamaterial ceramic, architected with multiscale graded porosity that synergistically integrates four nonlinear heat transfer mechanisms: ion-tailored conduction, cavity-modulated radiation, chaotic advection–enhanced convection, and spontaneous convective dissipation. This metaceramic achieves a record thermal rectification ratio of 8.5 at 2473 kelvin, surpassing previous benchmarks by over 140%. In addition, the design’s continuum-like, functionally partitionable nature enables its extension into a triaxial ultrahigh-temperature rectifier, which provides programmable, volumetric thermal flow control along three independent axes, effectively elevating rectification from a scalar to a tensor-like property. By decoupling and recombining multimodal nonlinearities within a single material, we overcome the classical stability-nonlinearity conflict. Our work establishes a metamaterials platform for breaking thermal reciprocity under extreme conditions, with implications for heat management in hypersonic systems, spacecraft, and energy technologies.
title_zh: Metaceramic 可实现超高温记录校正和可编程 3D 热控制
abstract_zh: 热整流可实现不对称热流，并为极端环境下的热管理提供变革潜力，但其实际发展受到高温稳定性和非线性热响应之间基本权衡的限制。传统整流器面临着固有的局限性，工作温度低于 900 开尔文，整流比低于 3.5。在这里，我们提出了一种超陶瓷，一种整体式超材料陶瓷，采用多尺度分级孔隙率构建，协同集成了四种非线性传热机制：离子定制传导、腔调制辐射、混沌平流增强对流和自发对流耗散。该超陶瓷在 2473 开尔文温度下实现了创纪录的 8.5 热整流比，超出之前的基准 140% 以上。此外，该设计的连续体、功能可分区性质使其能够扩展到三轴超高温整流器，该整流器沿三个独立轴提供可编程的体积热流控制，有效地将整流从标量提升到类似张量的属性。通过解耦和重新组合单一材料内的多模态非线性，我们克服了经典的稳定性与非线性冲突。我们的工作建立了一个超材料平台，可在极端条件下打破热互易性，对高超音速系统、航天器和能源技术的热管理具有影响。

title_zh: 使用 ESI FT-ICR MS 测定天然有机物中分子的稳定碳同位素比率
abstract_zh:
傅里叶变换离子回旋共振质谱 (FT-ICR MS) 能够非靶向识别天然有机物 (NOM) 中的分子式，但天然丰度的分子水平同位素分析仍然有限。在这里，我们提出了使用 FT-ICR MS 在 NOM 中进行分子式特定同位素分析 (MSIA) 的全面工作流程，包括针对通用参考材料 (RM) 进行校准。 MSIA 的核心步骤是强度调谐策略，通过充分的光谱平均，实现亚千分之一 (‰) 的精度和准确度，并实现稳健的同位素比较 (Δδ

title: Doppler-encoded Mie scattering rainbow of flying particles
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Light scattering constitutes the most fundamental process in light-matter interactions and serves as the cornerstone of modern particle metrology. Although numerous scattering-based techniques have been established for characterizing particles in constrained motion, the precise analysis of freely flying particles remains largely underdeveloped. This limitation stems primarily from the severe constraints on accessible data acquisition time and the motion-induced image blur inherent in conventional scattering detection schemes. Here, we report the observation of a Doppler-encoded Mie scattering effect using optically propelled microparticles in antiresonant hollow-core fibers and further introduce a transverse Doppler spectrometry for single-particle-level metrology of flying particles. It is found that, when collected in the near field by a high–numerical aperture objective, the scattering fringes of a flying particle with divergent diffraction angles are encoded with distinct Doppler frequency shifts—this forms a broadband “scattering rainbow” in the transverse direction relative to the incident beam axis. This angle-dependent Doppler effect transforms the spatial diffraction pattern of a flying particle into the frequency domain, enabling high-precision determination of diameter and refractive index of airborne particles within a millisecond-scale observation window. Our findings unlock degrees of freedom for resolving flying particle features in the frequency domain, establishing a versatile diagnostic platform for a broad spectrum of applications that demand in situ particle analysis, such as atmospheric aerosol monitoring, hypersonic flow diagnostics, and label-free flow cytometry.
title_zh: 多普勒编码的米氏散射飞行粒子彩虹
abstract_zh: 光散射构成了光与物质相互作用中最基本的过程，是现代粒子计量学的基石。尽管已经建立了许多基于散射的技术来表征受限运动中的粒子，但对自由飞行粒子的精确分析仍然很大程度上不发达。这种限制主要源于对可访问数据采集时间的严格限制以及传统散射检测方案中固有的运动引起的图像模糊。在这里，我们报告了使用反谐振空心光纤中的光学推进微粒观察到的多普勒编码米氏散射效应，并进一步介绍了用于飞行粒子的单粒子级计量的横向多普勒光谱测定法。研究发现，当用高数值孔径物镜在近场收集时，具有发散衍射角的飞行粒子的散射条纹被编码为明显的多普勒频移——这在相对于入射光束轴的横向上形成宽带“散射彩虹”。这种与角度相关的多普勒效应将飞行粒子的空间衍射图案转换到频域，从而能够在毫秒级观察窗口内高精度确定空气中粒子的直径和折射率。我们的研究结果解锁了解决频域中飞行粒子特征的自由度，为需要原位部件的广泛应用建立了多功能诊断平台

title: In search of exotic pairing in the Hubbard model: Many-body computation and quantum gas microscopy
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Finite-momentum pairing, exemplified by Fulde–Ferrell–Larkin–Ovchinnikov (FFLO) states, represents a paradigmatic form of unconventional superfluidity driven by Fermi-surface mismatch, but its detection in two-dimensional systems has remained elusive. Here we study a doped, spin-imbalanced attractive Hubbard model using a combined experimental and computational approach, based on quantum gas microscopy and constrained-path auxiliary-field quantum Monte Carlo, with direct comparisons showing quantitative agreement for short-range correlations at experimentally accessible temperatures. We identify broad regimes in density and magnetization where FFLO correlations emerge, and establish their finite-temperature evolution, with clear signatures of finite-momentum pairing already appearing at experimentally accessible temperatures. Spin–XY correlations are identified as a robust, directly measurable proxy for FFLO physics. Quantitative characterizations are obtained on the temperature dependence of a variety of observables and correlations, which elucidate the interplay of pairing with competing orders.
title_zh: 寻找哈伯德模型中的奇异配对：多体计算和量子气体显微镜
abstract_zh: 以富尔德-费雷尔-拉金-奥夫钦尼科夫（FFLO）状态为例的有限动量配对代表了由费米表面失配驱动的非常规超流性的范例形式，但其在二维系统中的检测仍然难以捉摸。在这里，我们使用基于量子气体显微镜和约束路径辅助场量子蒙特卡罗的组合实验和计算方法研究了掺杂的自旋不平衡有吸引力的哈伯德模型，并通过直接比较显示了在实验可达到的温度下短程相关性的定量一致性。我们确定了 FFLO 相关性出现的密度和磁化强度的广泛范围，并建立了它们的有限温度演化，在实验可达到的温度下已经出现了有限动量配对的清晰特征。自旋-XY 相关性被认为是 FFLO 物理的稳健、可直接测量的代理。根据各种可观测值和相关性的温度依赖性获得了定量表征，这阐明了配对与竞争订单的相互作用。

title: Control of naive T cell reactivity and peripheral tolerance by ascorbate and TET activity
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Peripheral tolerance depends on limiting conventional T cell responses to self-antigens. To define the contribution of nutritional factors and related epigenetic regulation, we perform in vivo CRISPR screening and identify the ascorbate transporter Slc23a2 as a key regulator of naive T cell (Tn) reactivity. T cell–specific loss of
                    Slc23a2
                    reduces intracellular ascorbate, induces regional DNA hypermethylation, enhances differentiation of Tn cells into effector and memory populations, and promotes low-grade autoimmune inflammation. These phenotypes mirror those caused by ascorbate deprivation,
                    TET
                    dioxygenase deficiency, and aging. Mechanistically, Slc23a2 maintains TET enzymatic activity through ascorbate, dampens proximal TCR signaling, represses helper T cell lineage programs, and sustains Tcf1 expression and chromatin binding in Tn cells. Deletion of
                    Tcf7
                    partially phenocopies
                    Slc23a2
                    deficiency, whereas Tcf1 overexpression mitigates the effects. Together, these findings identify ascorbate and TET-dependent DNA demethylation as a checkpoint that restrains Tn cell reactivity to self-antigens, thereby maintaining peripheral tolerance, a process compromised with aging.
title_zh: 通过抗坏血酸和 TET 活性控制初始 T 细胞反应性和外周耐受性
abstract_zh:
外周耐受取决于限制传统 T 细胞对自身抗原的反应。为了确定营养因素和相关表观遗传调控的贡献，我们进行了体内 CRISPR 筛选，并确定抗坏血酸转运蛋白 Slc23a2 作为初始 T 细胞 (Tn) 反应性的关键调节因子。 T 细胞特异性丧失
                    SLC23A2
                    减少细胞内抗坏血酸，诱导区域 DNA 高甲基化，增强 Tn 细胞分化为效应细胞和记忆细胞群，并促进低度自身免疫炎症。这些表型反映了抗坏血酸剥夺引起的表型，
                    TET
                    双加氧酶缺乏和衰老。从机制上讲，Slc23a2 通过抗坏血酸维持 TET 酶活性，抑制近端 TCR 信号传导，抑制辅助 T 细胞谱系程序，并维持 Tn 细胞中的 Tcf1 表达和染色质结合。删除
                    TCF7
                    部分表型
                    SLC23A2
                    缺乏，而 Tcf1 过度表达可以减轻影响。总之，这些发现将抗坏血酸和 TET 依赖性 DNA 去甲基化确定为一个检查点，可抑制 Tn 细胞对自身抗原的反应性，从而维持外周耐受性，这一过程会因衰老而受到损害。

title: Spatial transcriptomics identifies distinct domains regulating yield-component traits of the wheat ear
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Cereals form complex, highly ordered inflorescences composed of grain-producing florets that form within spikelets. Wheat spikelets are arranged in alternating rows along a central rachis, in a pattern determined during early development. While several genes controlling spikelet formation have been identified, it is still unclear how they interact to regulate inflorescence morphology and the development of supporting structures, including meristems and the rachis. Here, we used spatial transcriptomics to investigate the transcriptional landscape of a developing wheat inflorescence. We identified two spatially distinct regions that regulate spikelet architecture, including a primordium region characterized by
                    RAMOSA2
                    and a boundary region that expresses
                    ALOG1
                    and bract suppressors. Developmental assays indicate that spikelets differentiate from meristems and are accompanied by formation of the central vasculature that expresses spikelet number and fertility genes. The combined spatial transcriptome and genetic data reveal key regulators of spikelet development, including target genes for improving spikelet number and yield.
title_zh: 空间转录组学鉴定了调节麦穗产量组成性状的不同域
abstract_zh:
谷物形成复杂、高度有序的花序，由在小穗内形成的产生谷物的小花组成。小麦小穗沿着中央轴交替排列，其模式是在早期发育过程中确定的。虽然已经鉴定了一些控制小穗形成的基因，但仍不清楚它们如何相互作用来调节花序形态和支持结构（包括分生组织和轴）的发育。在这里，我们使用空间转录组学来研究发育中的小麦花序的转录景观。我们确定了两个空间上不同的区域来调节小穗结构，包括一个原基区域，其特征在于
                    拉莫萨2
                    以及表示的边界区域
                    模拟1
                    和苞片抑制器。发育分析表明，小穗从分生组织分化出来，并伴随着表达小穗数量和育性基因的中央脉管系统的形成。空间转录组和遗传数据的结合揭示了小穗发育的关键调节因子，包括提高小穗数量和产量的目标基因。

title: Dynamic monitoring of antibody drug conjugates targeting TROP2 or HER2 in breast cancer using circulating tumor cells
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Antibody–drug conjugates (ADCs) target surface proteins on cancer cells, leading to internalization and delivery of a drug payload, thereby enhancing selectivity and minimizing toxicity. ADCs against TROP2 (Sacituzumab govitecan) or HER2 (T-DXd) have demonstrated efficacy in metastatic breast cancer, yet paradoxically, outside of
                    HER2
                    -amplified breast cancers, expression levels of these breast cancer-enriched epitopes in tumor biopsies have not been strongly correlated with clinical response. We undertook serial quantitative imaging of circulating tumor cells (CTCs) in a prospective cohort of 35 patients treated with either of these ADCs. At the single-cell level, expression of TROP2 and HER2 within individual patients is highly heterogeneous in both CTCs and paired tumor biopsies. Measurement of these epitopes on CTCs immediately prior to ADC therapy does not predict depth of clinical response. However, absence of CTCs or >80% reduction in CTC numbers after three weeks of treatment (CTC
                    Low
                    ) predicts durable response, compared with CTC
                    High
                    cases (TROP2: HR 5.15,
                    P
                    = 0.012; HER2: HR 6.01,
                    P
                    < 0.001). Targeted epitopes are not commonly downregulated on CTCs at the time of acquired clinical resistance, and switching between TROP2- and HER2-targeting ADCs sharing similar payloads infrequently leads to second-line response. Thus, while CTC burden is correlated with response to these ADCs, the level of TROP2 or HER2 expression is poorly predictive. These findings point to sensitivity to the drug payload as a potential driver of clinical response to currently approved ADCs in breast cancer.
title_zh: 使用循环肿瘤细胞动态监测乳腺癌中针对 TROP2 或 HER2 的抗体药物偶联物
abstract_zh:
抗体药物偶联物 (ADC) 以癌细胞表面蛋白为目标，导致药物有效负载的内化和递送，从而提高选择性并最大限度地降低毒性。针对 TROP2 (Sacituzumab govitecan) 或 HER2 (T-DXd) 的 ADC 已证明对转移性乳腺癌有效，但矛盾的是，除了
                    HER2
                    -扩增的乳腺癌，肿瘤活检中这些富含乳腺癌的表位的表达水平与临床反应没有很强的相关性。我们对 35 名接受这两种 ADC 治疗的患者组成的前瞻性队列进行了循环肿瘤细胞 (CTC) 的连续定量成像。在单细胞水平上，TROP2 和 HER2 在个体患者体内的表达在 CTC 和配对肿瘤活检中具有高度异质性。在 ADC 治疗前立即测量 CTC 上的这些表位并不能预测临床反应的深度。然而，治疗三周后，CTC 消失或 CTC 数量减少 80% 以上（CTC
                    低
                    ) 与 CTC 相比，预测持久反应
                    高
                    案例（TROP2：HR 5.15，
                    磷
                    = 0.012； HER2：HR 6.01，
                    磷
                    < 0.001）。在获得临床耐药性时，CTC 上的靶向表位通常不会下调，并且共享相似有效负载的 TROP2 和 HER2 靶向 ADC 之间的切换很少会导致二线反应。因此，虽然 CTC 负担与反应相关

title: Defiance of stable lysogeny reveals hidden infection dynamics of phage Lambda
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Stable prophage establishment is considered a quintessential response of temperate phages when faced with host cell depletion. Scrutinizing this behavior in model phage λ, however, revealed that many λ-chromosomes avoid stable integration in the host chromosome, and rather assume a nonintegrated prophage-like (or pλ) state inside the cell that keeps expressing CI-based immunity and becomes asymmetrically segregated. This creates a heterogeneous population of host cells that are either i) immune by stably carrying an integrated λ prophage, ii) immune by carrying a pλ-episome, or iii) λ-free and transiently immune by segregating from a pλ-carrier. Superinfection of these immune cells drains the number of λ-virions and creates more pλ-episomes that prolong the immunity and expansion of the λ-free subpopulation. The subsequent decline in λ-virions causes cytoplasmically inherited CI-levels in λ-free siblings to dilute out, poising them for renewed lytic consumption by λ. These overlooked pλ-dynamics attenuate the importance of prophage establishment and permit a more productive phage–host coexistence.
title_zh: 对稳定溶原性的挑战揭示了噬菌体 Lambda 隐藏的感染动态
abstract_zh: 稳定的原噬菌体建立被认为是温带噬菌体面对宿主细胞耗竭时的典型反应。然而，仔细研究模型噬菌体 λ 中的这种行为，发现许多 λ 染色体避免在宿主染色体中稳定整合，而是在细胞内呈现非整合的原噬菌体样（或 pλ）状态，持续表达基于 CI 的免疫并变得不对称分离。这就产生了异质的宿主细胞群，它们要么 i) 通过稳定携带整合的 λ 原噬菌体进行免疫，ii) 通过携带 pλ-附加体进行免疫，或 iii) 通过与 pλ 载体分离而无 λ 且短暂免疫。这些免疫细胞的双重感染会耗尽 λ 病毒粒子的数量，并产生更多的 pλ 附加体，从而延长免疫能力并延长无 λ 亚群的扩张。随后 λ 病毒体的减少导致无 λ 病毒体中细胞质遗传的 CI 水平稀释，使它们为 λ 重新裂解消耗做好准备。这些被忽视的 pλ 动力学削弱了原噬菌体建立的重要性，并允许更高效的噬菌体-宿主共存。

title: Dual-chirality flexagon linkages with infinite eversion and surface reconfigurability
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
The flexagon, a classical kirigami structure capable of revealing hidden faces through eversion, has long captivated researchers. However, its potential for robust engineering applications has been limited by inherent structural discontinuities and unclear kinematic mechanisms. Here, we introduce a cyclic graph model and an idealized dual-chirality flexagon linkage with infinite eversion to explain the underlying mechanics of this eversion. We demonstrate that the eversion exhibits topological periodicity and multiple symmetries, while its kinematics correspond to a cyclic permutation of congruent axis sets induced by bifurcated motion. By tuning topological parameters, we construct a comprehensive atlas of the flexagon family. To address challenges in physical implementation, we propose a linkage convertibility strategy that eliminates mechanical interference and enables the design of reconfigurable, deployable networked structures. Furthermore, we develop an interchangeable-chirality flexagon that achieves an exponential expansion in accessible surface states, where the incremental states added in each expansion follow a geometric progression,

                    (where
                    p
                    denotes the eversion period and
                    g
                    represents the recursive generation index). This work bridges the gap between abstract topological concepts and physical realizations, offering a pathway to transform classical kirigami into advanced engineering linkages. It also provides foundational insights for related eversion systems, including Möbius strips, kaleidocycles, and other cyclic topological structures.
title_zh: 具有无限外翻和表面可重构性的双手性柔韧连杆
abstract_zh:
柔性边形是一种经典的剪纸结构，能够通过外翻露出隐藏的面孔，长期以来一直吸引着研究人员。然而，其强大的工程应用潜力受到固有的结构不连续性和不明确的运动机制的限制。在这里，我们引入循环图模型和具有无限外翻的理想化双手性柔边连杆，以解释这种外翻的基本机制。我们证明外翻表现出拓扑周期性和多重对称性，而其运动学对应于由分叉运动引起的全等轴组的循环排列。通过调整拓扑参数，我们构建了 Flexagon 家族的综合图集。为了解决物理实现中的挑战，我们提出了一种连杆可转换策略，该策略消除了机械干扰，并实现了可重构、可部署的网络结构的设计。此外，我们开发了一种可互换的手性柔性边，它在可访问的表面状态中实现了指数扩展，其中每次扩展中添加的增量状态遵循几何级数，

title: Pyrodictium abyssi AbpX reveals a calcium-responsive family of microbial biomatrix proteins that form thermostable hydrogels
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Evolutionary pressure on microbial communities propagating under extreme environmental conditions often results in unique structural adaptations to promote cell survival. Here, we report an investigation of AbpX, a biomatrix protein identified in cultures of the hyperthermophilic archaeon
                    Pyrodictium abyssi
                    . Under ex vivo and in vitro conditions, AbpX assembles into a paracrystalline lattice composed of semiflexible fibrils. CryoEM analysis of recombinant AbpX fibrils reveals that the precursor protein polymerizes through donor strand complementation (DSC), a process previously reported for chaperone-usher fimbriae in Gram-negative bacteria. Unlike the latter DSC protein polymers, AbpX undergoes chaperone-free polymerization in the presence of calcium ions, which are sequestered at the donor strand-acceptor groove interface between protomers in the fibril. Using a combination of cryoEM and crystallographic information, a structural model is proposed for the AbpX lattice that provides insight into its potential role in biofilm formation. These findings suggest that calcium ion coordination may contribute to fibril assembly and preorganize fibrils for incorporation into the protein lattice. Bioinformatic analysis indicates that AbpX exemplifies a distinct and broadly distributed clade of calcium ion responsive biomatrix proteins within the TasA superfamily that can be fabricated into hydrogel biomaterials in vitro under environmentally benign conditions.
title_zh: Pyrodictium abyssi AbpX揭示了形成热稳定水凝胶的钙响应微生物生物基质蛋白家族
abstract_zh:
在极端环境条件下繁殖的微生物群落的进化压力通常会导致独特的结构适应，以促进细胞存活。在这里，我们报告了对 AbpX 的一项研究，这是一种在超嗜热古菌培养物中发现的生物基质蛋白
                    深渊火盘菌
                    。在离体和体外条件下，AbpX 组装成由半柔性原纤维组成的旁晶晶格。重组 AbpX 原纤维的冷冻电镜分析表明，前体蛋白通过供体链互补 (DSC) 聚合，这是先前报道的革兰氏阴性细菌中伴侣引导菌毛的过程。与后者的 DSC 蛋白质聚合物不同，AbpX 在钙离子存在下进行无伴侣聚合，钙离子被隔离在原纤维中原聚体之间的供体链-受体沟界面处。结合冷冻电镜和晶体学信息，提出了 AbpX 晶格的结构模型，可深入了解其在生物膜形成中的潜在作用。这些发现表明，钙离子配位可能有助于原纤维组装和预组织原纤维以掺入蛋白质晶格中。生物信息分析表明，AbpX 体现了 TasA 超家族中钙离子响应生物基质蛋白的独特且广泛分布的分支，可以在环境友好的条件下在体外制造成水凝胶生物材料。

title: FcRL4 is an IgA receptor that primarily binds the joining chain
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Immunoglobulin A (IgA) is a crucial component of the human immune system, and its interaction with receptors is essential for immune regulation. Fc-receptor-like 4 (FcRL4) is an IgA receptor that selectively binds systemic IgA containing the joining chain (J-chain). The molecular mechanism of this interaction has remained unclear. Here, we present a cryo-EM structure of FcRL4 complexed with the dIgA core (Fcα dimer and J-chain), revealing a 1:1 binding stoichiometry. FcRL4 primarily interacts with the J-chain but can nevertheless discriminate against J-chain-containing IgM through an entropic penalty mechanism. Our structure also explains why FcRL4 does not bind secretory IgA, as the secretory component would hinder FcRL4 binding. Functional studies indicate that FcRL4 lacks the ability to internalize IgA or IgA immune complex. These findings provide fresh insights into IgA biology.
title_zh: FcRL4 是一种 IgA 受体，主要结合连接链
abstract_zh: 免疫球蛋白 A (IgA) 是人体免疫系统的重要组成部分，其与受体的相互作用对于免疫调节至关重要。 Fc 受体样 4 (FcRL4) 是一种 IgA 受体，可选择性结合含有连接链（J 链）的全身性 IgA。这种相互作用的分子机制仍不清楚。在这里，我们展示了 FcRL4 与 dIgA 核心（Fcα 二聚体和 J 链）复合的冷冻电镜结构，揭示了 1:1 的结合化学计量。 FcRL4 主要与 J 链相互作用，但仍然可以通过熵惩罚机制区分包含 J 链的 IgM。我们的结构还解释了为什么 FcRL4 不结合分泌型 IgA，因为分泌成分会阻碍 FcRL4 结合。功能研究表明 FcRL4 缺乏内化 IgA 或 IgA 免疫复合物的能力。这些发现为 IgA 生物学提供了新的见解。

title: ENO1 couples HDAC1 to regulate histone lactylation and gene transcription
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Histone deacetylases (HDACs) regulate transcription and catalyze deacetylation predominantly within canonical transcriptional complexes. Nevertheless, the mechanistic role of other HDAC-associated proteins in orchestrating this process remains incompletely understood. To systematically decode endogenous HDAC interactomes in living cells, we developed BimPL, a heterobifunctional molecule-enabled proximity labeling strategy. Leveraging BimPL and quantitative proteomics, we robustly captured established HDAC complexes and identified putative interactors, including glycolytic enzyme enolase-1 (ENO1). Importantly, we uncover that ENO1 translocates into the nucleus and interacts with HDAC1 at chromatin, which in turn blunts the activity of HDAC1 through locally generated phosphoenolpyruvate (PEP). Consequently, the ENO1–HDAC1 coupling promotes histone lysine lactylation (Kla), which drives transcriptional reprogramming of oncogenes in hepatic malignancies. Our study establishes BimPL as a versatile tool for mapping endogenous protein interactomes and reveals a metabolic enzyme-orchestrated HDAC regulatory mechanism for histone lactylation, highlighting ENO1’s moonlighting function in epigenetic reprogramming.
title_zh: ENO1 结合 HDAC1 调节组蛋白乳酰化和基因转录
abstract_zh: 组蛋白脱乙酰酶 (HDAC) 主要在经典转录复合物中调节转录并催化脱乙酰化。然而，其他 HDAC 相关蛋白在协调这一过程中的机制作用仍不完全清楚。为了系统地解码活细胞中的内源性 HDAC 相互作用组，我们开发了 BimPL，一种异双功能分子支持的邻近标记策略。利用 BimPL 和定量蛋白质组学，我们可靠地捕获了已建立的 HDAC 复合物并鉴定了假定的相互作用因子，包括糖酵解酶烯醇化酶-1 (ENO1)。重要的是，我们发现 ENO1 易位到细胞核中并与染色质处的 HDAC1 相互作用，进而通过局部生成的磷酸烯醇丙酮酸 (PEP) 减弱 HDAC1 的活性。因此，ENO1-HDAC1 偶联可促进组蛋白赖氨酸乳酰化 (Kla)，从而驱动肝脏恶性肿瘤中癌基因的转录重编程。我们的研究将 BimPL 确立为绘制内源蛋白质相互作用组的多功能工具，并揭示了代谢酶协调的组蛋白乳酰化 HDAC 调节机制，强调了 ENO1 在表观遗传重编程中的兼职功能。

title: Shared spatial and temporal principles govern connectome dynamics across timescales
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: While the brain processes information at various speeds, little is known about how the functional connectome can concurrently support multiple speeds in parallel. FMRI and electrophysiological modalities have been used to study connectome dynamics at slow and fast speeds, respectively. But it is often implicitly assumed that these modalities capture the same underlying neural processes, with fMRI doing so through a low-pass temporal filter. However, recent work suggests the alternative possibility that connectome dynamics comprise distinct processes operating at multiple timescales. If such multiscale connectivity processes indeed coexist, a key question is whether their patterns and sequences are organized on the basis of shared regularities, i.e., common spatial and temporal principles. In simultaneous human fMRI and source-localized EEG, we investigated the connectome’s foundational constituents—the instantaneous coactivation patterns—across six timescales of neural activity, from infraslow through γ-band. We found streams of recurrent coactivation patterns, or states, that operate in parallel and asynchronously across timescales, thereby forming a timescale-overarching spatial principle. These states also occurred in highly similar sequences at all timescales, revealing a timescale-overarching temporal principle. Together, these findings indicate that the connectome comprises multiple dynamic streams operating in parallel at distinct speeds, from tens of milliseconds to seconds, rather than a single stream filtered by each modality’s temporal resolution. Spatial and temporal principles that span these streams enable their integration into a unified system. Consequently, research on human behavior and mental disorders should account for the full range of the connectome’s timescales.
title_zh: 共享的空间和时间原则控制跨时间尺度的连接组动态
abstract_zh: 虽然大脑以不同的速度处理信息，但人们对功能性连接组如何同时支持多种速度的情况知之甚少。 FMRI 和电生理学模式已分别用于研究慢速和快速的连接组动力学。但人们常常隐含地假设这些模式捕获了相同的潜在神经过程，而功能磁共振成像通过低通时间滤波器来实现这一点。然而，最近的工作提出了另一种可能性，即连接组动力学包含在多个时间尺度上运行的不同过程。如果这种多尺度连通性过程确实共存，那么一个关键问题是它们的模式和序列是否是根据共同的规律（即共同的空间和时间原则）组织的。在同时进行的人类功能磁共振成像和源定位脑电图中，我们研究了连接组的基本成分——瞬时共激活模式——跨越六个神经活动时间尺度，从亚慢到γ波段。我们发现了循环共激活模式或状态流，它们在时间尺度上并行和异步运行，从而形成了时间尺度的总体空间原理。这些状态在所有时间尺度上也以高度相似的序列发生，揭示了时间尺度的总体时间原理。总之，这些发现表明，连接组由多个以不同速度（从几十毫秒到几秒）并行运行的动态流组成，而不是由每种模态的时间分辨率过滤的单个流。空间和时间

title: Supersaturation-controlled assembly pathway directs hierarchical chirality expression in ionic luminophores
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
The controlled expression of molecular chirality across multiple length scales is a central feature of many natural assemblies, yet remains a significant challenge to achieve in synthetic materials. Here, we show that supersaturation—particularly its temporal evolution—acts as a powerful kinetic parameter for directing chiral expression during antisolvent diffusion. By tuning diffusion conditions, two distinct assembly pathways can emerge from the same ion-paired luminophores. In all cases, nucleation is initiated upon reaching a critical supersaturation threshold, consistent with a common nucleation process. The subsequent growth pathways diverge depending on how supersaturation is sustained over time. When antisolvent diffusion is rapidly completed and the system transitions to an evaporation-dominated regime, gradual reorganization of intermediate assemblies produces macroscopic vortex-like films with pronounced chiral organization, whose large circularly polarized light emission dissymmetry factors (|g
                    CPLE
                    |) originate primarily from structure-induced scattering. In contrast, when supersaturation is continuously maintained through ongoing antisolvent diffusion, higher nucleation density combined with restricted growth leads to square microcrystals that exhibit only weak supramolecular chirality. The two pathways yield distinct chiroptical signatures with opposite CPLE signs and an order-of-magnitude difference in chiroptical response, with vortex films reaching |g
                    CPLE
                    | values up to 0.09. This study establishes a mechanistic link between supersaturation evolution and hierarchical chiral assembly and offers insights for designing macroscopic chiral photonic architectures with relevance to biomimetic and chiroptical applications.
title_zh: 过饱和控制的组装途径指导离子发光团中的分层手性表达
abstract_zh:
分子手性在多个长度尺度上的受控表达是许多天然组装体的核心特征，但在合成材料中实现仍然是一个重大挑战。在这里，我们证明过饱和度——特别是它的时间演化——在反溶剂扩散过程中充当指导手性表达的强大动力学参数。通过调整扩散条件，可以从相同的离子对发光体中出现两种不同的组装途径。在所有情况下，成核都是在达到临界过饱和阈值时开始的，这与常见的成核过程一致。随后的生长途径会有所不同，具体取决于过饱和度如何随着时间的推移而持续。当反溶剂扩散快速完成并且系统过渡到蒸发主导状态时，中间组装体的逐渐重组产生具有明显手性组织的宏观涡旋状薄膜，其大的圆偏振光发射不对称因子（|g）
                    CPLE
                    |）主要源自结构引起的散射。相反，当通过持续的反溶剂扩散持续维持过饱和时，较高的成核密度与受限的生长相结合，导致方形微晶仅表现出较弱的超分子手性。这两条路径产生了不同的手性光学特征，具有相反的 CPLE 符号，并且手性光学响应存在数量级差异，涡旋膜达到 |g
                    CPLE
                    |值高达 0.09。

title: A stage-based framework for closed-loop recycling of polymeric composite membranes
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Polymeric composite membranes are essential in modern separation technologies but pose critical challenges for sustainable end-of-life (EOL) management due to their chemically heterogeneous, multilayer structures. Existing approaches, such as mechanical processing or catalytic depolymerization, exhibit limited efficiency in separating and recovering multiple components. Here, we present a stage-based physical-chemical recycling strategy enabling multicomponent recovery and closed-loop regeneration of composite membranes through sequential solvent extraction, catalytic depolymerization, and membrane recasting. Using real EOL membranes as feedstock, the process yields regenerated membranes with mechanical robustness and separation performance comparable to commercial counterparts. Life-cycle assessment and technoeconomic analysis reveal substantial reductions in environmental impacts and material costs relative to conventional membrane manufacturing. By engineering a scalable process system for the circular recovery of complex membrane components, this work bridges materials science and process engineering, offering a viable route for sustainable management of polymeric composite waste streams.
title_zh: 聚合物复合膜闭环回收的基于阶段的框架
abstract_zh: 聚合物复合膜在现代分离技术中至关重要，但由于其化学异质多层结构，给可持续的报废 (EOL) 管理带来了严峻挑战。现有的方法，例如机械加工或催化解聚，在分离和回收多种组分方面表现出有限的效率。在这里，我们提出了一种基于阶段的物理化学回收策略，通过顺序溶剂萃取、催化解聚和膜重铸实现复合膜的多组分回收和闭环再生。该工艺使用真正的 EOL 膜作为原料，生产出具有与商业同类产品相当的机械坚固性和分离性能的再生膜。生命周期评估和技术经济分析表明，与传统膜制造相比，环境影响和材料成本大幅降低。通过设计一个可扩展的工艺系统来循环回收复杂的膜组件，这项工作将材料科学和工艺工程联系起来，为聚合物复合材料废物流的可持续管理提供了一条可行的途径。

title: Life-span–dependent transcriptional dynamics of the human heart
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
The human heart undergoes continuous transcriptional remodeling from development through aging, yet the cellular and regulatory features governing this process remain incompletely defined. Here, we generated a single-nucleus RNA sequencing atlas of 442,239 nuclei from 54 nonfailing myocardial tissues of 29 individuals spanning development, adulthood, and aging, covering left and right ventricles. Across all major cell types, we uncovered coordinated yet cell type–specific transcriptional trajectories that converge on progressive loss of gene expression homeostasis, stress responses, and inflammatory signaling over the life span. Cardiomyocytes displayed distinct age-associated transcriptional states enriched for senescence- and disease-related signatures. Regulatory network analysis identified
                    PRDM16
                    as a transcriptional regulator whose activity declined with age in cardiomyocytes. Functional perturbation of
                    PRDM16
                    in human cardiomyocyte models induced senescence, metabolic dysfunction, and stress responses, whereas its rebalancing in aged mouse hearts improved cardiac function and partially reversed aging-associated transcriptional programs. Last, leveraging life-span–resolved single-nucleus data, we constructed cardiac transcriptomic age prediction models that closely tracked chronological age in nonfailing hearts and revealed deviations consistent with accelerated aging in cardiomyopathies. Together, this study provides a comprehensive single-nucleus resource of the human heart across the life span and delineates cellular and regulatory features associated with cardiac aging.
title_zh: 人类心脏的寿命依赖性转录动力学
abstract_zh:
人类心脏从发育到衰老不断经历转录重塑，但控制这一过程的细胞和调控特征仍未完全确定。在这里，我们生成了包含 442,239 个细胞核的单核 RNA 测序图谱，这些细胞核来自 29 名个体的 54 个非衰竭心肌组织，涵盖发育期、成年期和衰老期，涵盖左心室和右心室。在所有主要细胞类型中，我们发现了协调但细胞类型特异性的转录轨迹，这些轨迹在整个生命周期中逐渐丧失基因表达稳态、应激反应和炎症信号传导。心肌细胞表现出独特的与年龄相关的转录状态，富含衰老和疾病相关的特征。监管网络分析确定
                    PRDM16
                    作为一种转录调节因子，其活性随着心肌细胞年龄的增长而下降。功能扰动
                    PRDM16
                    在人类心肌细胞模型中，它诱导衰老、代谢功能障碍和应激反应，而在老年小鼠心脏中，它的重新平衡改善了心脏功能，并部分逆转了与衰老相关的转录程序。最后，利用寿命解析的单核数据，我们构建了心脏转录组年龄预测模型，该模型密切跟踪非衰竭心脏的实际年龄，并揭示了与心肌病加速衰老一致的偏差。总之，这项研究提供了人类心脏整个生命周期的全面单核资源。

title: Live imaging and multimodal profiling reveal transdifferentiation of a cochlear supporting cell subpopulation upon Notch inhibition
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Regeneration enables organisms to repair damaged tissues, yet this capacity is notably limited in the cochlear sensory epithelium, essential for sound detection. A major cause of hearing loss arises from the irreversible loss of sensory hair cells (HCs) in the cochlea. While supporting cells (SCs) have a latent ability to transdifferentiate into HCs, this regenerative potential is rapidly lost after development. Using live imaging and single-cell multiomics of cochlear explants, we uncovered the cellular and molecular heterogeneity underlying the limited regenerative capacity of the neonatal mouse cochlea. Notch repression broadly silenced key SC genes, yet only a rare subpopulation of Deiters’ cells (DC), termed transdifferentiating DCs (tDCs), initiated the transdifferentiation into HC fate. These cells underwent coordinated transcriptional and enhancer remodeling, linking epigenetic priming with morphological plasticity, while other SCs remained refractory despite robust Notch targets down-regulation. Our study provides a molecular definition of an early induced transitional DC to HC state, revealing Notch inhibition as a selective trigger that unmasks rare regenerative competence.
title_zh: 实时成像和多模式分析揭示了 Notch 抑制后耳蜗支持细胞亚群的转分化
abstract_zh: 再生使生物体能够修复受损的组织，但这种能力在耳蜗感觉上皮中明显受到限制，而耳蜗感觉上皮对于声音检测至关重要。听力损失的一个主要原因是耳蜗中感觉毛细胞（HC）的不可逆损失。虽然支持细胞 (SC) 具有转分化为 HC 的潜在能力，但这种再生潜力在发育后会迅速丧失。利用耳蜗外植体的实时成像和单细胞多组学，我们发现了新生小鼠耳蜗再生能力有限的细胞和分子异质性。 Notch 抑制广泛沉默了关键的 SC 基因，但只有 Deiters 细胞 (DC) 的一个罕见亚群，称为转分化 DC (tDC)，启动了转分化为 HC 命运。这些细胞经历了协调的转录和增强子重塑，将表观遗传启动与形态可塑性联系起来，而其他 SC 仍然难以控制，尽管 Notch 目标下调。我们的研究提供了早期诱导的 DC 到 HC 状态过渡的分子定义，揭示了 Notch 抑制作为一种选择性触发因素，揭示了罕见的再生能力。

title: Non-Hermitian dynamics in quantum anomalous Hall insulators
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Magnetically doped topological insulators (TIs) exhibit two distinct phases: the quantum anomalous Hall (QAH) phase when the Fermi level resides within the surface gap and a metallic phase outside the gap. The QAH phase hosts unidirectional transport channels known as chiral edge states, while the metallic phase exhibits nonreciprocal transport due to unbalanced bidirectional edge states. Using the chiral edge states in Cr-doped (Bi,Sb)
                    2
                    Te
                    3
                    sandwich structures, we realize non-Hermitian conductance matrices in a one-dimensional Corbino chain with well-defined chirality. By tuning the boundary conditions from periodic to open, we reveal the non-Hermitian skin effect, where eigenstates localize exponentially at one end of the chain. In the metallic phase, we further observe asymmetric, bidirectional coupling between the neighboring sites in the conductance matrix, a direct consequence of the system’s intrinsic nonreciprocity. These results establish magnetic TIs as a powerful platform for investigating emergent non-Hermitian phenomena in topological systems.
title_zh: 量子反常霍尔绝缘体中的非厄米动力学
abstract_zh:
磁掺杂拓扑绝缘体 (TI) 表现出两个不同的相：费米能级位于表面间隙内时的量子反常霍尔 (QAH) 相和间隙外的金属相。 QAH 相具有称为手性边缘态的单向传输通道，而金属相由于不平衡的双向边缘态而表现出非互易传输。使用 Cr 掺杂 (Bi,Sb) 中的手性边缘态
                    2
                    碲
                    3
                    通过夹层结构，我们在一维 Corbino 链中实现了具有明确手性的非厄米电导矩阵。通过将边界条件从周期性调整为开放，我们揭示了非厄米集肤效应，其中本征态以指数方式集中在链的一端。在金属相中，我们进一步观察到电导矩阵中相邻位点之间的不对称双向耦合，这是系统固有非互易性的直接结果。这些结果将磁性 TI 确立为研究拓扑系统中出现的非厄米现象的强大平台。

title: Direct all-electrical decoding of vector vortex beams on chip
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Vector vortex beams, structured light fields characterized by polarization and phase singularities, offer substantial promise for next-generation photonic technologies. While the detection of scalar vortex beams has been investigated, the direct, all-electrical, and filter-free detection of vector vortex beams has remained a challenge. Here, we demonstrate an on-chip, all-electrical detection platform capable of simultaneously resolving the orbital angular momentum (OAM) order and polarization state of incident vector vortex beams. This functionality is achieved by coupling van der Waals layered thermoelectric materials with a phase-gradient metagrating, which spatially maps OAM and polarization information onto surface plasmon polariton intensity distributions, thereby inducing directionally modulated photothermoelectric responses. Leveraging these distinctive photoresponses, we demonstrate a proof-of-concept two-dimensional encrypted optical communication protocol. Our platform establishes a scalable approach for high-dimensional light field detection and lays the groundwork for advanced optoelectronic systems spanning secure communications, quantum information, optical manipulation, and high-resolution imaging.
title_zh: 芯片上矢量涡旋光束的直接全电解码
abstract_zh: 矢量涡旋光束、以偏振和相位奇点为特征的结构光场为下一代光子技术带来了巨大的希望。虽然标量涡旋光束的检测已经得到研究，但矢量涡旋光束的直接、全电和无滤波器检测仍然是一个挑战。在这里，我们展示了一个片上全电检测平台，能够同时解析入射矢量涡旋光束的轨道角动量（OAM）阶数和偏振态。这一功能是通过将范德华层状热电材料与相位梯度元光栅耦合来实现的，该元光栅将 OAM 和偏振信息空间映射到表面等离子体激元强度分布上，从而诱导定向调制的光热电响应。利用这些独特的光响应，我们演示了概念验证的二维加密光通信协议。我们的平台建立了一种可扩展的高维光场检测方法，并为涵盖安全通信、量子信息、光学操纵和高分辨率成像的先进光电系统奠定了基础。

title: Mathematical modeling of JAK2V617F clonal expansion in a general population cohort
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
The Philadelphia chromosome-negative myeloproliferative neoplasms (MPNs) are a group of blood cancers characterized by overproduction of one or more types of blood cells, which can lead to thrombosis and other complications. MPNs develop slowly and are driven by a relatively small set of mutations in the hematopoietic stem cells (HSCs). Their slow development (over the course of decades) affords a unique opportunity to study their onset, but until recently few data have been available from individuals not yet showing overt disease. Thanks to the ambitious Danish General Suburban Population Study conducted in suburban Zealand, Denmark, we have identified a (
                    
                      
                        
                          n
                          =
                          67
                        
                      
                    
                    ) cohort of individuals harboring the most common driver mutation in MPN (namely
                    JAK2V617F
                    ) and have obtained follow-up measurements of their variant allele fraction (VAF) spanning over 10 y. We show that these data are consistent with a Moran model governing the competition between healthy and mutated HSCs, and estimate the selective advantage of the mutant clone for each individual. Notably, we find that for many individuals, the change in VAF over many years is statistically consistent with zero, or even negative, selective advantage. This is in contrast to prior studies that have focused on patients diagnosed with overt MPN disease, in whom the mutant cells are almost always found to outcompete the healthy cells. Our results have implications for our understanding of the very early phases of MPN disease, and may contribute to early detection and personalized prediction of disease progression.
title_zh: 一般人群队列中 JAK2V617F 克隆扩增的数学模型
abstract_zh:
费城染色体阴性骨髓增生性肿瘤 (MPN) 是一组血癌，其特征是一种或多种类型的血细胞过度产生，可导致血栓形成和其他并发症。 MPN 发育缓慢，由造血干细胞 (HSC) 中相对较小的一组突变驱动。它们的缓慢发展（数十年）为研究其发病提供了独特的机会，但直到最近，尚未表现出明显疾病的个体的数据还很少。感谢在丹麦西兰郊区进行的雄心勃勃的丹麦一般郊区人口研究，我们确定了（
                    
                      
                        
                          n
                          =
                          67
                        
                      
                    
                    ）携带 MPN 中最常见驱动突变的个体队列（即
                    JAK2V617F
                    ）并获得了跨越 10 年的变异等位基因分数 (VAF) 的后续测量结果。我们证明这些数据与控制健康和突变 HSC 之间竞争的 Moran 模型一致，并估计每个个体突变克隆的选择优势。值得注意的是，我们发现对于许多人来说，多年来 VAF 的变化在统计上与零甚至负选择性优势一致。这与之前的研究形成鲜明对比，之前的研究重点关注被诊断为明显 MPN 疾病的患者。

title: Spatial transcriptome mapping identifies Ppara-Anxa2 cross-talk in microplastic-induced hepatotoxicity
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Microplastics (MPs) are increasingly recognized as an urgent global health concern, with mounting evidence linking their bioaccumulation to chronic disease risks. The liver, as a central organ for metabolic homeostasis and detoxification, is particularly sensitive to sustained MP exposure. However, the mechanisms underlying hepatic responses to polyethylene (PE), the most prevalent yet relatively understudied plastic type, remain poorly defined. By performing combined bulk and spatial transcriptomic analyses, we observed that PE resulted in hepatic dysfunction in mice fed on standard or metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis (MASH)–inducing diets, driving both globally and spatially distinct transcriptional alterations, including a nuclear receptor (NR),
                    Ppara
                    . Spatial transcriptomics uncovered the cell type heterogeneity and gene expression patterns masked in bulk analyses. Spatial clustering uncovered inflammatory hotspots characterized by reduced cellular diversity and distinct PE-responsive gene signatures. Among these, NR signaling emerged as a key regulatory axis, with Ppara identified as a modulator. We further demonstrated that Ppara regulates
                    Anxa2
                    , a gene involved in damage response and tissue recovery, through enhancer and promoter binding. These findings offer insights into how PE disrupts hepatic homeostasis and underscores the value of spatial transcriptomics in elucidating environmental impacts on tissue organization and gene expression regulation. This study provides a molecular framework for understanding MP-associated disruption of liver pathophysiology and highlights potential targets for therapeutic intervention.
title_zh: 空间转录组图谱鉴定了微塑料诱导的肝毒性中的 Ppara-Anxa2 串扰
abstract_zh:
微塑料 (MP) 越来越被认为是一个紧迫的全球健康问题，越来越多的证据表明其生物蓄积性与慢性疾病风险有关。肝脏作为代谢稳态和解毒的中心器官，对持续的 MP 暴露特别敏感。然而，聚乙烯（PE）是最普遍但研究相对较少的塑料类型，其肝脏反应的机制仍不清楚。通过进行整体和空间转录组学分析相结合，我们观察到，PE 导致食用标准或代谢功能障碍相关脂肪性肝炎 (MASH) 诱导饮食的小鼠出现肝功能障碍，驱动全局和空间上不同的转录改变，包括核受体 (NR)、

title: Superefficient optical frequency division referenced to μHz Schawlow-Townes-linewidth quantum noise–limited lasers
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Optical frequency division (OFD) converts ultrastable optical frequencies to microwaves via an optical frequency comb, generating microwave oscillators with record-low phase noise and time jitter. However, conventional OFD systems face a notable trade-off between division complexity and noise suppression because of severe thermal and technical noise in optical references. Here, we address this challenge by using common-cavity bicolor Brillouin lasers as references, operating at the fundamental quantum noise limit with a 10-microhertz Schawlow-Townes linewidth. Enabled by these ultracoherent lasers, our OFD system uses a markedly simplified comb divider with an unprecedented division factor of 10, producing a 10-gigahertz microwave signal with exceptional phase noise of −65 decibels relative to the carrier per hertz at 1-hertz offset, −155 decibels relative to the carrier per hertz at 10-kilohertz offset, and −172 decibels relative to the carrier per hertz at 10-megahertz offset. Leveraging this purity, we implement broadband synthesis from 5 to 20 gigahertz with millisecond tuning. This work redefines the trade-off between noise suppression and division complexity in OFD, paving the way for compact, high-performance microwave synthesis for next-generation atomic clocks, quantum sensors, and low-noise radar systems.
title_zh: 参考 μHz Schawlow-Townes 线宽量子噪声限制激光器的超高效光频分频
abstract_zh: 光频分 (OFD) 通过光频梳将超稳定的光频率转换为微波，产生具有创纪录的低相位噪声和时间抖动的微波振荡器。然而，由于光学参考中存在严重的热噪声和技术噪声，传统的 OFD 系统面临着划分复杂性和噪声抑制之间的显着权衡。在这里，我们通过使用共腔双色布里渊激光器作为参考来应对这一挑战，以 10 微赫兹 Schawlow-Townes 线宽在基本量子噪声极限下运行。在这些超相干激光器的支持下，我们的 OFD 系统使用了显着简化的梳状分频器，分频系数前所未有地达到 10，产生 10GHz 微波信号，其相位噪声在 1 赫兹偏移下相对于每赫兹载波为 -65 分贝，在 10 千赫偏移下相对于每赫兹载波为 -155 分贝，在 1 赫兹偏移下相对于每赫兹载波为 -172 分贝。 10兆赫偏移。利用这种纯度，我们通过毫秒调谐实现了 5 至 20 GHz 的宽带合成。这项工作重新定义了 OFD 中噪声抑制和除法复杂度之间的权衡，为下一代原子钟、量子传感器和低噪声雷达系统的紧凑、高性能微波合成铺平了道路。

title: State-switching navigation strategies in Caenorhabditis elegans are beneficial for chemotaxis
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Animals employ different strategies for relating sensory input and behavioral output to navigate sensory environments, but what strategy to use, when to switch and why remain unclear.
                    Caenorhabditis elegans
                    navigate by combining “steering” (small heading changes) with “turn” (large reorientations). It is unknown whether transitions between these elements are driven solely by sensory input or also by persistent internal states. It is also unclear how worms sometimes appear to exit turns such that they are already oriented toward a goal, despite their presumed lack of spatial awareness during turns. We address these questions with measurements of sensory-guided navigation and a statistical model of state-dependent control. Worm navigation is well described by a sensory-driven, two-state-switching model whose states persist for seconds and produce distinct sensorimotor mixtures: one state is steer-enriched, the other turn-enriched. This hierarchical temporal organization challenges the view that gradient-climbing strategies are static and purely stimulus-locked. Instead, sensory input causally modulates transitions between persistent states, creating the appearance of “directed turns” when exiting the turn-enriched state. Measurements using genetically perturbed animals and modeling with data-constrained reinforcement-learning both show that state switching enhances gradient-climbing performance. Together, measurement, perturbation, and modeling reveal that state switching is functionally beneficial, organizing behavior across time—a principle that may generalize across species and contexts.
title_zh: 秀丽隐杆线虫的状态转换导航策略有利于趋化性
abstract_zh:
动物采用不同的策略来关联感觉输入和行为输出来导航感觉环境，但使用什么策略、何时切换以及为什么仍不清楚。
                    秀丽隐杆线虫
                    通过将“转向”（小的航向变化）与“转向”（大的重新定向）相结合来进行导航。目前尚不清楚这些元素之间的转换是仅由感觉输入驱动还是由持久的内部状态驱动。目前还不清楚蠕虫有时是如何退出转弯的，从而使它们已经朝向目标，尽管它们在转弯时缺乏空间意识。我们通过感官引导导航的测量和状态相关控制的统计模型来解决这些问题。蠕虫导航可以通过一种感觉驱动的双状态切换模型来很好地描述，该模型的状态持续数秒并产生不同的感觉运动混合物：一种状态是转向丰富，另一种状态是转向丰富。这种分层的时间组织挑战了梯度攀登策略是静态的和纯粹刺激锁定的观点。相反，感觉输入会因果地调节持久状态之间的转换，从而在退出回合丰富状态时产生“定向回合”的外观。使用受到基因干扰的动物进行的测量以及使用数据约束的强化学习进行的建模都表明状态切换可以增强梯度攀爬性能。测量、扰动和建模共同揭示了状态切换在功能上是有益的，可以跨时间组织行为——这是一个首要原则

title: Untethered thin-film neurostimulator wrapped around tiny nerve trunks for wireless neuromodulation
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Electrical stimulation of tiny peripheral nerve trunks for near-organ neuromodulation enables precise electroceutical therapy for refractory diseases, but long-term stable neuromodulation of these delicate, fragile nerve trunks remains an engineering challenge. Here, we report the development of NeuroWrap Ultrasonic Stimulator (NWUS), an untethered, self-adhesive thin-film neurostimulator capable of conformally wrapping around tiny nerve trunks. The untethered architecture can help avoid the damage or rupture of tiny nerves due to uncontrollable micromotion of lead wires during bodily movements. The NWUS is an ultrasound-responsive acoustoelectric converter with optimized impedance matching, which enables highly effective wireless electrical stimulation. The electroceutical application of NWUS was further illustrated in chronic vagus nerve stimulation for immunomodulation therapy in a rat model. The wireless neuromodulation therapy of rat experimental autoimmune myocarditis was proven to restore left ventricular function, suppress proinflammatory cytokine expression as well as macrophage infiltration within cardiac tissue, and promote regulatory T cell recruitment along with increased anti-inflammatory cytokine levels.
title_zh: 不受束缚的薄膜神经刺激器包裹在微小的神经干上，用于无线神经调节
abstract_zh: 对微小周围神经干进行近器官神经调节的电刺激可以对难治性疾病进行精确的电疗法，但对这些脆弱的神经干进行长期稳定的神经调节仍然是一个工程挑战。在这里，我们报告了 NeuroWrap 超声波刺激器 (NWUS) 的开发，这是一种不受束缚的自粘薄膜神经刺激器，能够保形地包裹微小的神经干。这种不受束缚的结构可以帮助避免由于身体运动过程中引线无法控制的微运动而导致的微小神经的损伤或断裂。 NWUS 是一款超声波响应声电转换器，具有优化的阻抗匹配，可实现高效的无线电刺激。 NWUS 的电疗法应用在大鼠模型中用于免疫调节治疗的慢性迷走神经刺激中得到了进一步的说明。大鼠实验性自身免疫性心肌炎的无线神经调节疗法被证明可以恢复左心室功能，抑制促炎细胞因子的表达以及心脏组织内巨噬细胞的浸润，并促进调节性 T 细胞的募集以及抗炎细胞因子水平的增加。

title: Aridity-induced energy reallocation from green to brown food webs predicts grassland carbon storage
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Increasing aridity is predicted to alter the structure and functioning of soil food webs, yet its impacts on grassland food-web energetics and the resulting consequences for soil carbon sequestration remain poorly understood. Here, we quantified energy fluxes in soil food webs along a natural aridity gradient using data from 240 observations across 30 grassland ecosystems in the eastern Eurasian Steppe, spanning temperate (Loess and Inner Mongolian Plateaus) and alpine (Tibetan Plateau) regions. We found that increasing aridity decreases total energy flux through whole food webs across all study regions, largely driven by species losses and weakened trophic interactions. Energy flux to herbivory-based “green” channels declined more sharply than microbivory-based “brown” channels with increasing aridity, resulting in greater dominance of brown energy channels under more arid conditions across temperate grasslands. This broad-scale “browning” of soil food webs aligns with declining soil organic carbon (SOC) storage in temperate grasslands, suggesting that carbon loss through decomposition outpaces plant-derived carbon inputs under increasing aridity. In contrast, alpine grasslands showed increased SOC when the energy flux ratio of herbivory to microbivory was below the threshold of ~1, likely because lower temperatures constrain microbe-based decomposition and energy transfer to microbivory channels under more arid conditions. Understanding the context-dependent metabolic processes that underlie energy reallocation across soil food webs can augment modeling efforts to predict change to Earth’s carbon cycle.
title_zh: 干旱引起的从绿色食物网到棕色食物网的能量重新分配预示着草原碳储存
abstract_zh: 预计干旱的加剧会改变土壤食物网的结构和功能，但其对草原食物网能量的影响以及由此产生的土壤碳固存后果仍知之甚少。在这里，我们利用欧亚草原东部跨越温带（黄土和内蒙古高原）和高山（青藏高原）地区 30 个草原生态系统的 240 个观测数据，量化了沿自然干旱梯度的土壤食物网的能量通量。我们发现，干旱加剧会降低所有研究区域整个食物网的总能量通量，这主要是由于物种丧失和营养相互作用减弱所致。随着干旱程度的增加，以食草为基础的“绿色”通道的能量通量比以微生物为基础的“棕色”通道的能量通量下降得更快，导致在整个温带草原更加干旱的条件下，棕色能量通道占据更大的主导地位。土壤食物网的这种大范围“褐变”与温带草原土壤有机碳（SOC）储存量的下降相一致，这表明在干旱加剧的情况下，分解造成的碳损失超过了植物来源的碳输入。相比之下，当食草动物与微生物动物的能量通量比低于〜1的阈值时，高山草原的SOC增加，这可能是因为较低的温度限制了在更干旱的条件下基于微生物的分解和能量转移到微生物通道。了解土壤食物网中能量重新分配的基础代谢过程可以增强建模工作以进行预测

title: Rule-breaking in chemical synthesis
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Challenging century-old rules of structure, bonding, and reactivity enables the discovery of new synthetic chemistry involving amides and anti-Bredt olefins.
title_zh: 化学合成中的打破规则
abstract_zh: 挑战百年的结构、键合和反应性规则使得能够发现涉及酰胺和反布雷特烯烃的新合成化学。

title: Scalable multiplexed machine learning gas sensor chips for food classification
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Multiplexed gas sensor arrays combined with machine learning have unlocked previously inaccessible applications for scent-based sensing. Current platforms are limited by overlapping sensing materials with similar compositions, leading to highly correlated responses, or multistep deposition processes that hinder scalability. In this work, we developed a 16-element monolithic chip with fully distinct sensing layers, enabling a truly heterogeneous array. The system consists of highly sensitive carbon nanotube field effect transistors that are functionalized through a single-step microdispensing method compatible with automated pipetting systems. The resulting chip produces characteristic signal patterns in response to object-specific scent profiles and, when combined with machine learning algorithms, can perform automated object identification. We demonstrate the classification of 16 different objects, including food spoilage and nut allergens, with a 92.6% overall prediction accuracy.
title_zh: 用于食品分类的可扩展多路复用机器学习气体传感器芯片
abstract_zh: 多路气体传感器阵列与机器学习相结合，解锁了以前无法实现的基于气味的传感应用。当前的平台受到具有相似成分的重叠传感材料的限制，导致高度相关的响应，或多步骤沉积过程阻碍了可扩展性。在这项工作中，我们开发了一款具有完全不同传感层的 16 元件单片芯片，从而实现了真正的异构阵列。该系统由高度灵敏的碳纳米管场效应晶体管组成，通过与自动移液系统兼容的单步微分配方法进行功能化。由此产生的芯片会根据特定物体的气味特征产生特征信号模式，并且与机器学习算法相结合，可以执行自动物体识别。我们展示了对 16 种不同对象的分类，包括食物腐败和坚果过敏原，总体预测准确度为 92.6%。

title: Characterization of the biosynthetic enzymes of the Morus alba benzofuran natural products
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Moracins are a distinct class of benzofuran natural products, primarily found in Moraceae plants. Despite their varying biological activities and interesting chemical structures, little is known about their biosynthesis. Here, we elucidate the biosynthetic pathway of moracin M, a common intermediate in moracin biosynthesis. Using thermal proteome profiling, we identified a noncanonical laccase from
                    Morus alba
                    (MaLAC) that catalyzes an unprecedented oxidative cyclization of oxyresveratrol to moracin M. Distinct from other plant laccases, MaLAC is the first plant laccase shown to catalyze an intramolecular oxidative cyclization reaction in natural product biosynthesis. Mechanistic studies revealed a copper-mediated radical cyclization, providing guidance for engineering laccases to catalyze synthetically valuable intramolecular oxidative cyclization. The biosynthetic pathway for moracin M was heterologously constructed in
                    Nicotiana benthamiana
                    . This work not only provides important insights into moracin biosynthesis, laying the foundation for manufacturing bioactive moracins via metabolic engineering strategies, but also demonstrates the power of label-free chemoproteomics in elucidating unknown biosynthetic pathways of plant secondary metabolites.
title_zh: 桑树苯并呋喃天然产物生物合成酶的表征
abstract_zh:
Moracins 是一类独特的苯并呋喃天然产物，主要存在于桑科植物中。尽管它们具有不同的生物活性和有趣的化学结构，但人们对它们的生物合成知之甚少。在这里，我们阐明了 moracin M（莫拉辛生物合成中常见的中间体）的生物合成途径。使用热蛋白质组分析，我们从
                    白桑
                    (MaLAC) 可催化氧化白藜芦醇前所未有的氧化环化为 moracin M。与其他植物漆酶不同，MaLAC 是第一个被证明可催化天然产物生物合成中分子内氧化环化反应的植物漆酶。机理研究揭示了铜介导的自由基环化，为工程漆酶催化具有综合价值的分子内氧化环化提供了指导。 moracin M 的生物合成途径异源构建于
                    本塞姆氏烟草
                    。这项工作不仅为莫拉辛生物合成提供了重要见解，为通过代谢工程策略制造具有生物活性的莫拉辛奠定了基础，而且展示了无标记化学蛋白质组学在阐明植物次生代谢物未知生物合成途径方面的力量。

title: NEDDylation maintains oocyte quality by stabilizing mitochondrial transcription
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Age-related decline in oocyte quality increases the risk of infertility, miscarriage, and birth defects. Mitochondrial dysfunction is a key contributor to this decline. Here, we report that oocyte-specific deletion of
                    Uba3
                    , which encodes the catalytic subunit of the E1 NEDDylation-activating complex, causes sterility in mice. Fully grown, germinal vesicle–stage
                    Uba3
                    conditional knockout oocytes exhibit mitochondrial dysfunction, including elevated reactive oxygen species, impaired oxidative phosphorylation, and depletion of mitochondrially encoded RNA transcripts. Proteomic analysis identified alterations in mitochondrial-associated proteins, including enrichment of mitochondrial matrix and respiratory chain components and reduced abundance of electron transport chain complexes. These defects were associated with reduced levels of the mitochondrial RNA polymerase, POLRMT [polymerase (RNA) mitochondrial DNA directed]. We further show that POLRMT is directly modified by NEDDylation, which alters its stability by antagonizing ubiquitylation and degradation. Notably, NEDD8 levels decline with age in both mouse and human oocytes. Together, these findings identify NEDDylation as a regulator of oocyte quality and connect this pathway to mitochondrial transcription in oocytes.
title_zh: NEDdylation 通过稳定线粒体转录来维持卵母细胞质量
abstract_zh:
与年龄相关的卵母细胞质量下降会增加不孕、流产和出生缺陷的风险。线粒体功能障碍是造成这种下降的一个关键因素。在这里，我们报告卵母细胞特异性删除
                    乌巴3
                    编码 E1 NEDDylation 激活复合物的催化亚基，导致小鼠不育。完全生长，生发囊泡阶段
                    乌巴3
                    条件性敲除卵母细胞表现出线粒体功能障碍，包括活性氧升高、氧化磷酸化受损以及线粒体编码的RNA转录本耗竭。蛋白质组学分析发现了线粒体相关蛋白的变化，包括线粒体基质和呼吸链成分的富集以及电子传递链复合物丰度的减少。这些缺陷与线粒体 RNA 聚合酶 POLRMT [聚合酶 (RNA) 线粒体 DNA 定向] 水平降低有关。我们进一步表明 POLRMT 直接被 NEDDylation 修饰，NEDDylation 通过拮抗泛素化和降解来改变其稳定性。值得注意的是，小鼠和人类卵母细胞中的 NEDD8 水平随着年龄的增长而下降。总之，这些发现确定 NEDDylation 是卵母细胞质量的调节剂，并将该途径与卵母细胞中的线粒体转录联系起来。

title: Electric field–induced ferromagnetic domain change by ferroelectric topological domain switching in Co-substituted BiFeO3 nanodots
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Electric field–induced magnetization reversal accompanying polarization switching is promising for low–power consumption, nonvolatile, voltage-write, magnetic-read memory applications. Perovskite BiFe
                    0.9
                    Co
                    0.1
                    O
                    3
                    is a room-temperature multiferroic material in which both ferroelectric and weakly ferromagnetic orders coexist, with spontaneous magnetization coupled to the ferroelectric polarization. Here, we report electric field–induced ferroelectric and ferromagnetic domain changes in BiFe
                    0.9
                    Co
                    0.1
                    O
                    3
                    nanodots using a combination of piezoresponse microscopy and scanning nitrogen-vacancy center magnetometry assisted by image analysis techniques to directly observe both ferroic orders on the nanometer scale. The complex ferroelectric domains present in a 190-nanometer structure which can be switched from a net-down to a net-up polarization by scanning with a biased cantilever, accompanied by reversal of both in-plane and out-of-plane components of the magnetization. This directly demonstrates electric field–induced magnetization reversal accompanying 180° polarization switching in a complex structure of a scale relevant to the semiconductor industry, creating a potential path for next generation memory devices.
title_zh: 钴取代 BiFeO3 纳米点中铁电拓扑域切换引起的电场诱导铁磁域变化
