title: Assembling a True “Olympic Gel” From over 16 000 Combinatorial DNA Rings (Adv. Mater. 34/2026)
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract: Olympic Gels This cover illustrates the molecular structure of an “Olympic gel” composed of mechanically interlocked plasmids. The ring-shaped DNA molecules can reversibly open and close via diversified lock-and-key domains, enabling controlled formation of mechanical bonds. The study shows that combinatorial synthetic biology can yield compositionally complex soft materials with exotic topological architectures and unique physical characteristics. More details can be found in the Research Article by Michael Lang, Elisha Krieg, and co-workers (DOI: 10.1002/adma.202520549).
title_zh: 从超过 16 000 个组合 DNA 环组装真正的“奥林匹克凝胶”（Adv. Mater. 34/2026）
abstract_zh: Olympic Gels 本封面展示了由机械连锁质粒组成的“Olympic gel”的分子结构。环形DNA分子可以通过多样化的锁和钥匙结构域可逆地打开和关闭，从而实现机械键的受控形成。研究表明，组合合成生物学可以产生成分复杂的软材料，具有奇异的拓扑结构和独特的物理特性。更多详细信息，请参阅 Michael Lang、Elisha Krieg 及其同事的研究文章 (DOI: 10.1002/adma.202520549)。

title: Pressure‐Independent Acoustic‐Vortex Communication With Enhanced‐Capacity and Cryptographic Information by Free‐Flooded Metasurfaces (Adv. Mater. 34/2026)
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract: Hydrostatic-Pressure-Immune Underwater Acoustic Communication In their Research Article (DOI: 10.1002/adma.202521718), Hao-Wen Dong and co-workers present a hydrostatic-pressure-immune underwater acoustic communication that can maintain stable functionality in deep sea, unaffected by extreme hydrostatic pressure. Customized free-flooded metasurfaces are employed to modulate and demodulate coaxial vortices carrying multiplexed information, enabling the simultaneous transmission of multiple physical-encoding data streams. By integrating physical wave manipulation with computational encryption, this system offers a secure, high-capacity communication paradigm resilient to eavesdropping, with promising applications in deep-sea exploration and the development of robust marine information systems.
title_zh: 通过自由淹没超表面实现具有增强容量和加密信息的压力无关声涡流通信（Adv. Mater. 34/2026）
abstract_zh: 不受静水压力的水声通信 在他们的研究文章（DOI：10.1002/adma.202521718）中，Hao-Wen Dong 及其同事提出了一种不受静水压力的水声通信，可以在深海中保持稳定的功能，不受极端静水压力的影响。采用定制的自由淹没超表面来调制和解调携带多路复用信息的同轴涡流，从而能够同时传输多个物理编码数据流。通过将物理波操纵与计算加密相结合，该系统提供了一种安全、高容量的通信范式，能够抵御窃听，在深海勘探和强大的海洋信息系统的开发方面具有广阔的应用前景。

title: Unravelling the Secret of Sulfur Confinement and High Sulfur Utilization in Hybrid Sulfur‐Carbons (Adv. Mater. 34/2026)
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract: Hybrid Sulfur-Carbons The cover image illustrates a collapsed, hierarchically porous carbon architecture that imposes both chemical and kinetic confinement on sulfur species in a sodium-sulfur composite cathode. Short sulfur chains are stabilized within interconnected pore compartments, where interfacial anchoring at carbon defect sites and constricted pore necks suppress sulfur migration and mitigate shuttle effects. The spatially heterogeneous pore network gives rise to diffusion-limited Na+ transport, with ion accessibility decreasing toward the interior, highlighting the role of pore hierarchy and structural asymmetry in regulating electrochemical conversion. This combined confinement strategy enables near-quantitative sulfur utilization and state-of-the-art electrochemical performance in room-temperature sodium-sulfur batteries. More details can be found in the Research Article by Evgeny Senokos and co-workers (DOI: 10.1002/adma.202513346).
title_zh: 揭开混合硫碳中硫限制和高硫利用率的秘密（Adv. Mater. 34/2026）
abstract_zh: 杂化硫-碳 封面图片展示了一种塌陷的分层多孔碳结构，该结构对钠-硫复合阴极中的硫物质施加化学和动力学限制。短硫链在互连的孔隙隔室内稳定，其中碳缺陷位点的界面锚定和收缩的孔隙颈部抑制硫迁移并减轻穿梭效应。空间异质孔隙网络引起扩散限制的Na+传输，离子可及性向内部降低，突出了孔隙层次和结构不对称在调节电化学转换中的作用。这种组合限制策略可以在室温钠硫电池中实现近乎定量的硫利用率和最先进的电化学性能。更多详细信息，请参阅 Evgeny Senokos 及其同事的研究文章 (DOI: 10.1002/adma.202513346)。

title: Cold Atmospheric Plasma‐Activated Decellularized Extracellular Matrix Gel as a Tumor‐Infiltrating Immunoactivation Platform for Post‐Surgical Cancer Immunotherapy (Adv. Mater. 34/2026)
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract: Cold Atmospheric Plasma-Activated Decellularized Extracellular Matrix Gel A pseudo-colored scanning electron micrograph (original data) showcasing the intricate architecture of an injectable, plasma-activated decellularized tumor extracellular matrix (CAP-DECM) hydrogel. The image highlights the hydrogel's capacity to recruit tumor cells (highlighted in red), transforming the post-operative environment into a localized, immune-activating niche designed to prevent cancer recurrence. More details can be found in the Research Article by Guojun Chen and co-workers (DOI: 10.1002/adma.202515444).
title_zh: 冷常压等离子体激活的脱细胞外基质凝胶作为术后癌症免疫治疗的肿瘤浸润免疫激活平台（Adv. Mater. 34/2026）
abstract_zh: 冷常压等离子体激活脱细胞肿瘤细胞外基质凝胶伪彩色扫描电子显微照片（原始数据）展示了可注射等离子体激活脱细胞肿瘤细胞外基质 (CAP-DECM) 水凝胶的复杂结构。该图像突出显示了水凝胶招募肿瘤细胞（以红色突出显示）的能力，将术后环境转变为旨在预防癌症复发的局部免疫激活生态位。更多详细信息，请参阅Guojun Chen 及其同事的研究文章（DOI：10.1002/adma.202515444）。

title: Intrinsically Stable Amorphous Phases Unlock Sustainable Potassium Anodes
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Non‐graphite‐based anodes for potassium‐ion batteries offer high capacity but suffer from severe structural degradation due to repeated phase transitions during cycling. Here, we introduce an amorphous phase engineering strategy that fundamentally addresses this instability. The intrinsic structural isotropy and open framework of amorphous materials inherently mitigate volume strain, enabling exceptional long‐term cycling stability. As a proof of concept, an amorphous (Bi,Sb)@C electrode exhibits an ultralow capacity decay rate of merely 0.005% per cycle over 3200 cycles (equivalent to 1100 days) at 100 mA g
                    −1
                    . This work establishes amorphous phase engineering as a general design paradigm, opening a decisive pathway toward durable, long‐life potassium‐ion batteries and potentially other energy storage systems facing similar stability challenges.
title_zh: 本质稳定的非晶相解锁可持续的钾阳极
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    用于钾离子电池的非石墨基阳极具有高容量，但由于循环过程中反复发生相变而遭受严重的结构退化。在这里，我们引入了一种非晶相工程策略，从根本上解决了这种不稳定性。非晶材料固有的结构各向同性和开放框架本质上减轻了体积应变，从而实现了出色的长期循环稳定性。作为概念证明，非晶 (Bi,Sb)@C 电极在 100 mA g-1 电流下，在 3200 个循环（相当于 1100 天）中表现出超低的容量衰减率，每个循环仅为 0.005%
                    −1
                    。这项工作将非晶相工程确立为一种通用设计范式，为实现耐用、长寿命的钾离子电池以及面临类似稳定性挑战的其他潜在储能系统开辟了一条决定性途径。

title: RFX-mod2 and the NEFERTARI project: A distributed research network for the study of magnetically confined plasmas for fusion
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: This paper describes the status of the implementation of the upgrades for the RFX-mod2 device, the second major modification of the Reversed Field eXperiment (RFX). The machine’s core update consists of a thin copper stabilizing shell placed inside the vacuum vessel to ensure long-term stability of resistive wall modes (RWM) and enable regimes with fast-rotating tearing modes. A comprehensive modernization of the facility’s technological plants and diagnostics is being carried out within the NEFERTARI project (New Equipment For the Experimental Research and Technological Advancement for the RFX Infrastructure). Funded by the Italian National Recovery and Resilience Plan (NRRP) under Next Generation EU, NEFERTARI aims to strengthen the RFX infrastructure and its network of partners. Significant plant upgrades include: the refurbishment of the main vacuum system and the development of a new glow discharge cleaning (GDC) system based on eight fixed electrodes for more uniform wall conditioning; a major overhaul of the control and data acquisition system, now featuring a high-resolution multichannel acquisition system with over 1500 channels that eliminates the need for analogue integrators; the enhancement edge plasma characterization and of core diagnostics, such as the high-repetition-rate (up to 3 kHz) Thomson Scattering system and the expanded soft x-ray (SXR) tomography; the upgrade of the existing and installation of new reflectometric system; the restoration of the Diagnostic Neutral Beam Injector (DNBI) for spatially resolved ion temperature measurements. Furthermore, the paper highlights the contributions of the Italian laboratory network, including the BiGyM infrastructure for testing innovative plasma-facing components; the ROMAN remote handling facility for in-vessel maintenance development; dedicated laboratories for the development of neutron detectors and for optical diagnostics for the characterization of surfaces, and for high-voltage electrical insulation testing.
title_zh: RFX-mod2 和 NEFERTARI 项目：用于研究聚变磁约束等离子体的分布式研究网络
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 RFX-mod2 设备升级的实施状况，这是反向现场实验 (RFX) 的第二次重大修改。该机器的核心更新包括放置在真空容器内的薄铜稳定壳，以确保电阻壁模式 (RWM) 的长期稳定性，并实现快速旋转撕裂模式的状态。 NEFERTARI 项目（RFX 基础设施实验研究和技术进步的新设备）正在对该设施的技术设备和诊断进行全面现代化改造。 NEFERTARI 由下一代欧盟意大利国家复苏和复原计划 (NRRP) 资助，旨在加强 RFX 基础设施及其合作伙伴网络。工厂的重大升级包括：翻新主真空系统以及开发基于八个固定电极的新型辉光放电清洁（GDC）系统，以实现更均匀的壁调节；对控制和数据采集系统进行了重大改造，现在具有超过 1500 个通道的高分辨率多通道采集系统，无需模拟积分器；增强边缘等离子体表征和核心诊断，例如高重复率（高达 3 kHz）汤姆逊散射系统和扩展软 X 射线（SXR）断层扫描；升级现有的反射测量系统并安装新的反射测量系统；修复用于空间分辨离子温度测量的诊断中性束注入器 (DNBI)。此外，

title: Understanding the chemistry of re-emerging proton batteries
source: RSC - Chem. Soc. Rev. latest articles
abstract: Proton battery (PB) technology has regained attention in recent years as a promising energy storage alternative to conventional lithium-ion batteries due to its excellent electrochemical performance, scalability, and environmental friendliness. To assess its potential, we provide a comprehensive review of its re-emergence, including its historical background, construction, working principles, and favorable materials. The growing global demand for energy storage and the role of PBs in addressing this need are highlighted, and the historical background tracing the evolution of PBs, from their early conceptualizations to recent advancements, is covered. Battery components such as electrodes and electrolytes are discussed, and the mechanisms underlying proton conduction, catalytic activity, and surface chemistry at the electrode–electrolyte interfaces are also summarized. Furthermore, various proton-conducting materials and media are examined, along with a discussion on their structural and electrochemical properties. Finally, a SWOT analysis covers the strengths, weaknesses, opportunities, and threats of PBs and offers valuable perspectives regarding R&D prospects. This review emphasizes the need for continued innovation to unlock the full potential of PBs as sustainable energy storage alternatives.
title_zh: 了解重新出现的质子电池的化学成分
abstract_zh: 近年来，质子电池（PB）技术由于其优异的电化学性能、可扩展性和环境友好性，作为传统锂离子电池的一种有前景的储能替代品重新受到关注。为了评估它的潜力，我们对它的重新出现进行了全面的回顾，包括它的历史背景、构造、工作原理和有利的材料。强调了全球对储能不断增长的需求以及PB在满足这一需求中的作用，并涵盖了追踪PB从早期概念到最近进展的演变的历史背景。讨论了电极和电解质等电池组件，还总结了电极-电解质界面的质子传导、催化活性和表面化学的机制。此外，还检查了各种质子传导材料和介质，并讨论了它们的结构和电化学特性。最后，SWOT 分析涵盖了 PB 的优势、劣势、机遇和威胁，并提供了有关研发前景的宝贵观点。本次审查强调需要持续创新，以释放PB作为可持续能源存储替代品的全部潜力。

title: Lewis acidic molecule-modulated synchronous anion immobilization and decomposition towards a robust solid electrolyte interphase with enhanced Zn2+ kinetics
source: RSC - Energy Environ. Sci. latest articles
abstract: Zn metal anodes in aqueous zinc-ion batteries (AZIBs) face significant challenges for practical applications, due to detrimental dendrite growth and severe side reactions arising from unstable solid electrolyte interface (SEI) layers, sluggish Zn 2+ transport kinetics, and irreversible Zn deposition. While anion regulation is a promising strategy for constructing a stable SEI layer, typical approaches mainly rely on strengthening Zn 2+ -anion interactions, which slows Zn 2+ desolvation and reduces transport efficiency. To resolve these trade-offs, we have introduced tris(pentafluorophenyl)borane (TPFPB) as a multifunctional additive of Lewis acidic that enables synchronous anion immobilization and decomposition.Theoretical and experimental results reveal that the electron-deficient boron centers and pentafluorophenyl groups in TPFPB can effectively anchor anions via B-O/F bonds. This unique structure (i) promotes direct anion decomposition to form a robust ZnS/ZnF 2 -rich SEI; (ii) restricts anion mobility; and (iii) weakens the Zn 2+ -anion association, thereby enhancing the interfacial stability and Zn 2+ transport kinetics. As a result, Zn anodes achieve a Coulombic efficiency of 99.7% over 2800 cycles, and the vanadium-based full cells deliver a lifespan exceeding 40,000 cycles. This work presents a novel anion-regulation strategy that simultaneously stabilizes the Zn interface and accelerates ion transport, offering a promising path toward high-performance AZIBs.
title_zh: 路易斯酸性分子调节同步阴离子固定和分解，形成具有增强 Zn2+ 动力学的稳健固体电解质界面
abstract_zh: 由于有害的枝晶生长和不稳定的固体电解质界面（SEI）层引起的严重副反应、缓慢的 Zn 2+ 传输动力学和不可逆的 Zn 沉积，水性锌离子电池（AZIB）中的锌金属负极在实际应用中面临着重大挑战。虽然阴离子调节是构建稳定SEI层的一种有前景的策略，但典型的方法主要依赖于加强Zn 2+ -阴离子相互作用，这会减慢Zn 2+ 去溶剂化并降低传输效率。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了三(五氟苯基)硼烷(TPFPB)作为路易斯酸的多功能添加剂，能够同步固定和分解阴离子。理论和实验结果表明，TPFPB中的缺电子硼中心和五氟苯基可以通过B-O/F键有效锚定阴离子。这种独特的结构 (i) 促进阴离子直接分解，形成坚固的富含 ZnS/ZnF 2 的 SEI； (ii) 限制阴离子迁移率； (iii)削弱Zn 2+ -阴离子缔合，从而增强界面稳定性和Zn 2+ 传输动力学。因此，锌阳极在 2800 次循环中库仑效率达到 99.7%，钒基全电池的使用寿命超过 40,000 次循环。这项工作提出了一种新颖的阴离子调节策略，可同时稳定 Zn 界面并加速离子传输，为高性能 AZIB 提供了一条有前途的道路。

title: Inhibition of shuttle effect in organic cathode and in situ mechanistic exploration
source: RSC - Energy Environ. Sci. latest articles
abstract: Organic p-type cathode materials are promising for sustainable energy storage due to their abundance, environmental compatibility, and high operating voltages exceeding 3.5 V. However, their application is constrained by high solubility in electrolytes, leading to shuttle effect and inferior cycle stability. Herein, we introduced 9,9-dimethylacridine (DMAC) as a novel redox-active moiety in cathode material design. The small polar -C(CH3)2 group in DMAC stabilizes its oxidized form (DMAC +• ), restricting shuttle effect in polar electrolytes and achieving excellent cycling stability (76% capacity retention after 3000 cycles). Moreover, trace amounts of dissolved DMAC +• serve as redox mediators, enhancing conductivity and enabling a high active material ratio (73 mAh g -1 @90 wt%). Importantly, the integration of aggregation-induced emission (AIE) properties enables in situ fluorescence imaging, realizing visualization of the dissolution/ reprecipitation processes and providing insights into the shuttle effect. Coupled with electrochemical quartz crystal microbalance with dissipation (EQCM-D) analysis, this study advances DMAC-based cathodes and establishes a framework broadly applicable to other anion storage systems where DMAC redox-active centers contact with polar electrolytes.
title_zh: 有机阴极穿梭效应的抑制及原位机理探索
abstract_zh: 有机p型正极材料由于其丰富性、环境兼容性和超过3.5 V的高工作电压而有望用于可持续储能。然而，其应用受到电解质中高溶解度的限制，导致穿梭效应和较差的循环稳定性。在此，我们引入了 9,9-二甲基吖啶（DMAC）作为正极材料设计中的新型氧化还原活性部分。 DMAC 中的小极性 -C(CH3)2 基团可稳定其氧化形式 (DMAC +• )，限制极性电解质中的穿梭效应并实现出色的循环稳定性（3000 次循环后容量保持率为 76%）。此外，微量溶解的DMAC +• 充当氧化还原介体，增强电导率并实现高活性材料比率（73 mAh g -1 @90 wt%）。重要的是，聚集诱导发射（AIE）特性的集成可以实现原位荧光成像，实现溶解/再沉淀过程的可视化并提供对穿梭效应的见解。结合电化学石英晶体微天平与耗散（EQCM-D）分析，这项研究改进了基于DMAC的阴极，并建立了一个广泛适用于DMAC氧化还原活性中心与极性电解质接触的其他阴离子存储系统的框架。

title: Why More Junctions Do Not Yet Deliver: Interconnection Challenges in Perovskite Multijunction Solar Cells
source: RSC - Energy Environ. Sci. latest articles
abstract: Single-junction photovoltaic technologies are approaching their practical efficiency limits. Perovskite-based multijunction solar cells offer a path beyond these limits through reduced thermalization losses and improved spectral utilization. Although tandem architectures are not new to the photovoltaic community, perovskite-based tandems have, for the first time, opened a realistic path toward gigawatt-scale deployment of this technology. Over the past decade, remarkable progress has been achieved, and the technology is now moving steadily toward industrial scaling. Beyond complementing crystalline silicon, perovskites constitute a versatile tandem device component that can be implemented in fully perovskite-based architectures, fabricated on diverse substrates, and even extended to triple or quadruple-junction configurations. However, this advancement introduces new technological challenges, particularly in the interconnection of perovskite sub-cells. Achieving reliable electrical coupling while maintaining interfacial and structural integrity is challenging, as high-efficiency devices often involve multiple solution-processed layers, where similar solvents used in adjacent sub-cells can cause interlayer dissolution or chemical degradation. Furthermore, film imperfections such as cracks, pinholes, and delamination - often driven by mechanical stress and accumulated strain - emerge frequently during fabrication and scale-up and require careful management. This perspective examines these interconnection-related challenges and charts future directions in perovskite-based multijunction solar cells beyond the general electronic view of recombination junctions.
title_zh: 为什么更多的结尚未交付：钙钛矿多结太阳能电池的互连挑战
abstract_zh: 单结光伏技术正在接近其实际效率极限。基于钙钛矿的多结太阳能电池通过减少热化损失和提高光谱利用率提供了超越这些限制的途径。尽管串联结构对于光伏界来说并不新鲜，但基于钙钛矿的串联结构首次为该技术的千兆瓦规模部署开辟了一条现实道路。在过去的十年里，该技术取得了显着的进步，目前正在稳步迈向产业规模化。除了补充晶体硅之外，钙钛矿还构成了一种多功能串联器件组件，可以在完全基于钙钛矿的架构中实现，在不同的基板上制造，甚至可以扩展到三结或四结配置。然而，这一进步带来了新的技术挑战，特别是在钙钛矿子电池的互连方面。在保持界面和结构完整性的同时实现可靠的电耦合具有挑战性，因为高效器件通常涉及多个溶液处理层，其中相邻子电池中使用的类似溶剂可能会导致层间溶解或化学降解。此外，裂纹、针孔和分层等薄膜缺陷（通常由机械应力和累积应变引起）在制造和放大过程中经常出现，需要仔细管理。这个视角审视了这些与互连相关的挑战，并描绘了基于钙钛矿的多晶硅的未来方向

title: Breaking the Performance Trade-offs in Ammonia Synthesis via Spontaneous Proton Supply
source: RSC - Energy Environ. Sci. latest articles
abstract: Recent advances in plasma- and photocatalysis-driven nitrogen oxidation have renewed interest in sustainable N2 → NO3− → NH3 pathways. However, electrocatalytic NO3−-to-NH3 is typically confined to narrow potential windows attributed to the performance trade-offs between activity, selectivity, and stability, hindering energy-efficient operation under fluctuating renewable electricity inputs. To overcome these constraints, we report an anodic activation strategy for transition metal oxides in which lattice disruption and surface reorganization generate a highly active, self-sustaining hydroxide interface. Interfacial hydroxyl groups balance the active proton supply with the stepwise reduction of nitrogenous intermediates, thereby accelerating the hydrogenation kinetics of nitrate reduction reaction (NO3RR) while simultaneously suppressing the competing hydrogen evolution reaction (HER). The activated catalyst delivers a Faradaic efficiency of 93.79%, an energy efficiency of 35.42% and an NH3 yield rate of 17230.56 µg h−1 mgcat−1 at −0.2 V vs. the reversible hydrogen electrode (RHE), outperforming previously reported NO3RR electrocatalysts under comparable conditions. Notably, the exceptional activity and selectivity are maintained over a broad potential window from −0.2 V to −0.6 V vs. RHE, enabling efficient and robust nitrate-to-ammonia conversion under dynamic renewable-power operation.
title_zh: 通过自发质子供应打破氨合成的性能权衡
abstract_zh: 等离子体和光催化驱动的氮氧化的最新进展重新引起了人们对可持续 N2 → NO3− → NH3 途径的兴趣。然而，由于活性、选择性和稳定性之间的性能权衡，电催化NO3−to-NH3通常局限于狭窄的电势窗口，阻碍了可再生电力输入波动下的节能运行。为了克服这些限制，我们报告了一种过渡金属氧化物的阳极活化策略，其中晶格破坏和表面重组产生高活性、自维持的氢氧化物界面。界面羟基平衡活性质子供应与含氮中间体的逐步还原，从而加速硝酸盐还原反应（NO3RR）的加氢动力学，同时抑制竞争性析氢反应（HER）。与可逆氢电极（RHE）相比，活化的催化剂在-0.2 V下的法拉第效率为93.79%，能源效率为35.42%，NH3产率为17230.56 µg h−1 mgcat−1，在相当的条件下优于先前报道的NO3RR电催化剂。值得注意的是，与 RHE 相比，在 -0.2 V 至 -0.6 V 的宽电位窗口内保持了出色的活性和选择性，从而在动态可再生能源运行下实现高效、稳健的硝酸盐到氨的转化。

title: Sulfonyl-PYBOX/ErCl3 complex enable highly enantioselective synthesis of α,α-dialkyl and α-alkyl-α-aryl hydrazinonitriles
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: We report the highly enantioselective nucleophilic addition reaction of simple ketone-derived hydrazones. Accordingly, a ErCl₃-catalyzed cyanation of both aliphatic and aryl ketone hydrazones is achieved for the facile access of Cα-tetrasubstituted α-hydrazino nitriles in up to 96% ee, by using the sterically confined pyridinebisoxazoline (PYBOX) ligand featuring a sulfonyl group at the pyridine C4 position. This method enables the shortest catalytic enantioselective total synthesis of L-carbidopa, a drug that could treat the symptoms of Parkinson’s disease, with 82% overall yield in four steps. These adducts are valuable synthons to various α-tertiary hydrazines and related azacycles that are interesting targets for medicinal studies and pesticide research. From our biological analysis, a chiral α-hydrazino nitrile with good insecticidal activity against Aphis gossypii (LC50 = 15.11 mg∙L–1) was identified, rivaling commercial insecticides.
title_zh: 磺酰基-PYBOX/ErCl3 络合物能够高度对映选择性合成 α,α-二烷基和 α-烷基-α-芳基肼腈
abstract_zh: 我们报道了简单酮衍生腙的高度对映选择性亲核加成反应。因此，通过使用在吡啶C4位上具有磺酰基的空间限制的吡啶双恶唑啉（PYBOX）配体，实现了ErCl3催化的脂肪族和芳基酮腙的氰化，以容易地获得高达96％ee的Cα-四取代的α-肼腈。该方法能够以最短的时间催化对映选择性全合成 L-卡比多巴（一种治疗帕金森病症状的药物），四步总产率为 82%。这些加合物是各种 α-叔肼和相关氮杂环的有价值的合成子，是医学研究和农药研究的有趣目标。根据我们的生物学分析，鉴定出一种手性 α-肼基腈，对棉蚜 (Aphis gossypii) 具有良好的杀虫活性 (LC50 = 15.11 mg∙L–1)，可与商业杀虫剂相媲美。

title: Process-separated cascade catalysis for highly efficient alkane-to-aromatic conversion
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Bifunctional catalysis is pivotal to industrial heterogeneous catalytic processes, yet its performance is limited by the kinetic entanglement among different elementary steps. In the conversion of light alkanes to aromatics, a promising non-naphtha route to produce benzene, toluene and xylene (BTX) that examples this challenging, this paper describes a process-separated cascade catalysis (PSCC) for efficient BTX synthesis, prioritizing kinetic decoupling over spatial intimacy of active sites in bifunctional systems. We employ a spatially decoupled metal-zeolite catalyst, achieving >95% propane conversion and 82.3% aromatic selectivity with near-exclusive BTX formation at 550 °C during continuous reaction-regeneration cycles. In situ spectroscopies and kinetics analysis reveal that PSCC decouples kinetics of alkane dehydrogenation to olefine intermediates (ethene, propene) in the first stage and synchronizes this process with oligomerization and aromatization reactions in the second stage. This synchronization affords the rate matching of two stage, thus minimizes cracking by-products and enhances BTX production substantially. Combined with high catalytic stability and technoeconomic assessment, this PSCC strategy represents a robust pathway in alkane (C2–C4)-to-BTX conversion and beyond bifunctional catalysis processes.
title_zh: 用于高效烷烃至芳烃转化的工艺分离级联催化
abstract_zh: 双功能催化对于工业多相催化过程至关重要，但其性能受到不同基本步骤之间的动力学缠结的限制。在将轻质烷烃转化为芳烃的过程中，这是一种很有前景的非石脑油生产苯、甲苯和二甲苯 (BTX) 的路线，这就是这一挑战的例子，本文描述了一种用于高效 BTX 合成的过程分离级联催化 (PSCC)，优先考虑双功能系统中活性位点的动力学解耦而不是空间亲密度。我们采用空间解耦金属沸石催化剂，在连续反应再生循环过程中，在 550 °C 下实现了 >95% 的丙烷转化率和 82.3% 的芳烃选择性，并几乎完全形成了 BTX。原位光谱和动力学分析表明，PSCC 在第一阶段解耦了烷烃脱氢生成烯烃中间体（乙烯、丙烯）的动力学，并使该过程与第二阶段的低聚和芳构化反应同步。这种同步提供了两级的速率匹配，从而最大限度地减少了裂解副产物并大幅提高了 BTX 产量。结合高催化稳定性和技术经济评估，该 PSCC 策略代表了烷烃 (C2–C4) 至 BTX 转化以及双功能催化过程之外的稳健途径。

title: Atomically precise Au8Pd1(DPPF)42+ catalyst orchestrates the synthesis and utilization of hydrogen peroxide
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Atomically precise metal clusters that merge structural clarity, functional modularity, and tunable spatial programmability have gained momentum over the past decade. Here, we report the catalysis of an atomically precise Au8Pd1(DPPF)42+ (DPPF = 1,1’-bis(diphenylphosphino)ferrocene) cluster in the synthesis and utilization of hydrogen peroxide. The cluster shows a concerto-like synergy of metal core and surface ligand in the entire catalytic process, in which the metal core catalyzes the reaction of formic acid and oxygen to produce H2O2, and subsequently DPPF ligands work with the core to drive the conversion of H2O2 into hydroxyl radicals. Notably, with the computational fluid dynamics simulation assistance, the heterogeneous catalyst from the assembly of Au8Pd1(DPPF)42+ clusters into mesoporous Al2O3 monolith enables continuous generation and utilization of H2O2 performed in the fixed-bed reactor. This work offers an alternative route for the efficient upgrading of H2O2 synthesis and application.
title_zh: 原子级精确的 Au8Pd1(DPPF)42+ 催化剂协调过氧化氢的合成和利用
abstract_zh: 融合结构清晰度、功能模块化和可调空间可编程性的原子精确金属簇在过去十年中获得了发展势头。在这里，我们报道了原子级精确的 Au8Pd1(DPPF)42+ (DPPF = 1,1'-双(二苯基膦)二茂铁)簇在过氧化氢的合成和利用中的催化作用。该簇在整个催化过程中表现出金属核和表面配体的协奏曲般的协同作用，其中金属核催化甲酸和氧反应生成H2O2，随后DPPF配体与核共同作用，驱动H2O2转化为羟基自由基。值得注意的是，在计算流体动力学模拟的帮助下，将 Au8Pd1(DPPF)42+ 团簇组装成介孔 Al2O3 整体的多相催化剂能够在固定床反应器中连续生成和利用 H2O2。这项工作为H2O2合成和应用的高效升级提供了一条替代途径。

title: Flexible infrared camouflage eutectic gallium-indium for thermoelectric energy harvesting
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Integrated infrared camouflage materials capable of energy harvesting and sensing hold great potential for enhancing operational efficiency in military settings. A key challenge, however, lies in achieving such multifunctionality without complex fabrication processes. In this study, we address this issue by introducing eutectic gallium‑indium (EGaIn) as a versatile material that combines infrared camouflage with thermoelectric sensing. EGaIn exhibits remarkable infrared camouflage performance over a broad temperature range. It suppresses its own thermal radiation by reflecting ambient infrared radiation, concealing its infrared signature for infrared camouflage. In addition to its infrared camouflage function, one of the most notable features of EGaIn is its ability to generate voltage from small temperature gradients. This thermoelectric capability enables self‑powered, real‑time monitoring of physiological states like body temperature and breathing patterns. Our work highlights the pathways toward military technologies that combine infrared camouflage with signal transmission capabilities.
title_zh: 用于热电能量收集的柔性红外伪装共晶镓-铟
abstract_zh: 具有能量收集和传感功能的集成红外伪装材料在提高军事环境中的作战效率方面具有巨大潜力。然而，一个关键的挑战在于如何在不复杂的制造工艺的情况下实现这种多功能性。在这项研究中，我们通过引入共晶镓铟（EGaIn）作为一种将红外伪装与热电传感相结合的多功能材料来解决这个问题。 EGaIn 在较宽的温度范围内表现出卓越的红外伪装性能。它通过反射周围的红外辐射来抑制自身的热辐射，隐藏其红外特征以进行红外伪装。除了红外伪装功能外，EGaIn 最显着的特点之一是它能够从小温度梯度产生电压。这种热电功能可以实现自供电、实时监测体温和呼吸模式等生理状态。我们的工作强调了将红外伪装与信号传输能力相结合的军事技术的发展路径。

title: It slices! It dices! Sashimi-Bot handles seafood with ease
source: Nature
abstract: Fillets of raw fish are irregular in shape and floppy in texture, but a robot with three arms has learnt how to manipulate a salmon loin. Fillets of raw fish are irregular in shape and floppy in texture, but a robot with three arms has learnt how to manipulate a salmon loin.
title_zh: 它切片！它切丁了！ Sashimi-Bot 轻松处理海鲜
abstract_zh: 生鱼片形状不规则，质地松软，但三臂机器人已经学会了如何操作鲑鱼腰肉。生鱼片形状不规则，质地松软，但三臂机器人已经学会了如何操作鲑鱼腰肉。

title: Programmable microwave cluster states via Josephson metamaterials
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Cluster states are a fundamental resource for continuous-variable quantum computing, enabling measurement-based protocols that can scale beyond the limitations of qubit-based architectures. Here, we demonstrate on-demand generation of multimode entangled microwave cluster states using a programmable Josephson Traveling-Wave Parametric Amplifier (JTWPA) operated in the three-wave mixing regime. By injecting a tailored, non-equidistant set of pump tones via an arbitrary waveform generator, we engineer frequency-specific nonlinear couplings between multiple frequency modes. The entanglement structure is verified via frequency-resolved heterodyne detection of quadrature nullifiers, confirming the target graph topology of the cluster state. Our approach allows reconfigurability through the pumps spectrum and supports scalability by leveraging the wide bandwidth and spatial homogeneity of the JTWPA. This platform opens new avenues for scalable measurement-based quantum information processing in the microwave domain, compatible with superconducting circuit architectures.
title_zh: 通过约瑟夫森超材料实现可编程微波簇状态
abstract_zh: 簇状态是连续变量量子计算的基本资源，使基于测量的协议能够超越基于量子位的架构的限制。在这里，我们演示了使用在三波混频状态下运行的可编程约瑟夫森行波参量放大器（JTWPA）按需生成多模纠缠微波簇状态。通过任意波形发生器注入一组定制的、非等距的泵浦音，我们设计了多个频率模式之间的特定频率的非线性耦合。通过正交抵消器的频率分辨外差检测来验证纠缠结构，确认簇状态的目标图拓扑。我们的方法允许通过泵频谱进行重新配置，并通过利用 JTWPA 的宽带宽和空间均匀性来支持可扩展性。该平台为微波领域基于测量的可扩展量子信息处理开辟了新途径，与超导电路架构兼容。

title: Optical access of spin-polarized excited states in Cs(PbMgZnCd)Br3 nanocrystals
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The interplay of slow spin relaxation (long τS) and fast radiative recombination (short τR) is essential for using spin-polarized excited states in lead halide perovskites towards spintronics and quantum-optics technologies. Herein, we report on the observation of simultaneously long τS (59.8 ps) and short τR (3.4 ns) in the colloidal nanocrystals of high-entropy perovskites, Cs(PbMgZnCd)Br3, which enables the optical access and spin manipulation of excited states at room temperature. The incorporation of non-Pb metals spatially separates the [PbBr6]4− framework into smaller domains below the Bohr radius of excitons, and the size confinement leads to blue-shifted bright photoluminescence from short-lived photoexcitation species. Moreover, the distortion of [PbBr6]4− lattice is significantly enhanced in high-entropy structures, which enlarges the Rashba spin splitting and consequently prolongs τS over an order of magnitude. Optical write-in and read-out of spin states via circularly polarized light are achieved for both photoluminescence and amplified spontaneous emission from Cs(PbMgZnCd)Br3. Optical Hanle effect is demonstrated and allows for very efficient spin manipulation (positive/negative polarizations ~25.8%) under a perpendicular magnetic field, showing the great potential of high-entropy perovskites for opto-spintronic applications.
title_zh: Cs(PbMgZnCd)Br3 纳米晶中自旋偏振激发态的光学获取
abstract_zh: 慢速自旋弛豫（长τS）和快速辐射复合（短τR）的相互作用对于利用卤化铅钙钛矿中的自旋极化激发态实现自旋电子学和量子光学技术至关重要。在此，我们报告了在高熵钙钛矿 Cs(PbMgZnCd)Br3 的胶体纳米晶体中同时观察到长 τS (59.8 ps) 和短 τR (3.4 ns)，这使得在室温下能够实现激发态的光学访问和自旋操纵。非Pb金属的掺入在空间上将[PbBr6]4−框架分成激子玻尔半径以下的更小的域，并且尺寸限制导致短寿命光激发物质的蓝移明亮光致发光。此外，[PbBr6]4− 晶格的畸变在高熵结构中显着增强，这扩大了 Rashba 自旋分裂，从而将 τS 延长了一个数量级。通过圆偏振光对自旋态进行光学写入和读出，可实现 Cs(PbMgZnCd)Br3 的光致发光和放大自发发射。光学汉勒效应得到证明，并允许在垂直磁场下进行非常有效的自旋操纵（正/负极化~25.8%），显示出高熵钙钛矿在光自旋电子应用中的巨大潜力。

title: Cu-Catalyzed dynamic kinetic asymmetric allylation enabled enantioselective assembly of sterically congested triaryl tertiary alcohols
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Chiral α,β,β-triaryl tertiary alcohols represent significant structural motifs that find extensive applications in pharmaceuticals and bioactive molecules. Their distinctiveness lies in their unique three-dimensional architectures, which are conducive to interactions with biological targets, thus making them particularly worthy of attention. However, the stereocontrolled assembly of adjacent chiral centers within these sterically congested scaffolds has remained a formidable challenge. Herein, we present a Cu-catalyzed dynamic kinetic asymmetric allylation of racemic α,β,β-triarylethanones, providing efficient access to a diverse range of chiral α,β,β-triaryl tertiary alcohols with robust enantioselectivity and diastereoselectivity. When combined with subsequent transformations, this method establishes a highly flexible platform for the synthesis of antitubercular agent (S,S)-TBAJ-587 and bedaquiline stereoisomers. Mechanistic investigations, including control experiments, density functional theory calculations, and interaction region indicator analyses, indicate that the steric characteristics of the ligand and weak intermolecular interactions synergistically lower the reaction energy barrier and enhance both reaction activity and stereocontrol.
title_zh: 铜催化的动态不对称烯丙基化能够实现空间拥挤的三芳基叔醇的对映选择性组装
abstract_zh: 手性 α,β,β-三芳基叔醇代表了在药物和生物活性分子中广泛应用的重要结构基序。它们的独特之处在于其独特的三维结构，有利于与生物目标的相互作用，从而使它们特别值得关注。然而，在这些空间拥挤的支架内相邻手性中心的立体控制组装仍然是一个艰巨的挑战。在此，我们提出了外消旋α,β,β-三芳基乙醇的铜催化动态动力学不对称烯丙基化，提供了有效获得各种手性α,β,β-三芳基叔醇的方法，并具有强大的对映选择性和非对映选择性。与后续转化相结合，该方法为抗结核药物 (S,S)-TBAJ-587 和贝达喹啉立体异构体的合成建立了高度灵活的平台。包括控制实验、密度泛函理论计算和相互作用区域指示剂分析在内的机理研究表明，配体的空间特征和弱分子间相互作用协同降低了反应能垒，增强了反应活性和立体控制。

title: Attaining 19.12% solar cell efficiency for non-fused ring electron acceptors via multi-dimensional charge transport
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Non-fused ring electron acceptors (NFREAs) exhibit substantial commercial application potential. Nevertheless, their subpar electron transport performance results in slightly low power conversion efficiencies (PCEs) of organic solar cells (OSCs). Herein, we put forward an innovative supramolecular side-chain-induced multi-dimensional charge transport strategy to exploit two NFREAs 3TT-Ph2 and 3TT-Ph4 with terminal phenyl/fluorinated phenyl side chains. In comparison to the unfunctionalized control molecule 3TT-2, both 3TT-Ph2 and 3TT-Ph4 form additional phenyl-acceptor (Ph-A) supramolecular interactions between the phenyl side groups and the cyanoindanone end groups. Meanwhile, these fluorinated terminal phenyl groups can induce the formation of multiple supramolecular interactions, including F···F, F···H and F···C. The synergistic effect of these supramolecular interactions promotes the tight and ordered stacking of molecules, facilitates the construction of multi-dimensional charge transport channel. Finally, D18:3TT-Ph4-based device achieved a record-breaking PCE of 19.12% and a fill factor of 80.65%. Our research pave an effective strategy for the molecular design of high-performance NFREAs.
title_zh: 通过多维电荷传输，非稠环电子受体获得 19.12% 的太阳能电池效率
abstract_zh: 非稠环电子受体（NFREA）表现出巨大的商业应用潜力。然而，其电子传输性能不佳导致有机太阳能电池（OSC）的功率转换效率（PCE）略低。在此，我们提出了一种创新的超分子侧链诱导的多维电荷传输策略，以利用具有末端苯基/氟化苯基侧链的两种 NFREA 3TT-Ph2 和 3TT-Ph4。与未功能化的控制分子3TT-2相比，3TT-Ph2和3TT-Ph4在苯基侧基和氰基茚满酮端基之间形成额外的苯基受体（Ph-A）超分子相互作用。同时，这些氟化末端苯基可以诱导多种超分子相互作用的形成，包括F…F、F…H和F…C。这些超分子相互作用的协同效应促进了分子紧密有序的堆积，有利于多维电荷传输通道的构建。最终，基于D18:3TT-Ph4的器件实现了破纪录的19.12%的PCE和80.65%的填充因子。我们的研究为高性能 NFREA 的分子设计提供了有效的策略。

title: Brexit tore apart European science — now the research rifts are healing
source: Nature
abstract: The UK’s share of EU research funding is climbing, but lost networks will be harder to recover. The UK’s share of EU research funding is climbing, but lost networks will be harder to recover.
title_zh: 英国脱欧撕裂了欧洲科学——现在研究分歧正在弥合

title: Hydration control in molecular salts through counterion selection
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Predicting when and why molecular salts form hydrates has remained a significant problem in solid-state chemistry, despite its impact on the stability and performance of industrially relevant materials. Here, we identify counterion charge localization as a key determinant of hydrate formation in molecular salts, providing a framework for predicting and controlling solid-state hydration. By analyzing over 31,000 crystal structures and performing electron density calculations, we show that delocalized counterion charge suppresses hydrate formation, while localized charge promotes it. This principle makes hydration propensity a more tuneable property (from ~80% to Ka rule, we experimentally demonstrate rational control of hydration in salts of 4-aminoacetanilide. Our results establish a direct link between molecular electrostatics and crystallization outcomes, affording predictive design of molecular salts with tailored hydration behavior.
title_zh: 通过抗衡离子选择控制分子盐的水合
abstract_zh: 预测分子盐形成水合物的时间和原因仍然是固态化学中的一个重大问题，尽管它对工业相关材料的稳定性和性能有影响。在这里，我们将反离子电荷定位确定为分子盐中水合物形成的关键决定因素，为预测和控制固态水合提供了框架。通过分析 31,000 多个晶体结构并进行电子密度计算，我们发现离域反离子电荷抑制水合物形成，而局域电荷则促进水合物形成。这一原理使水合倾向变得更加可调（从~80％到Ka规则，我们通过实验证明了4-氨基乙酰苯胺盐中水合的合理控制。我们的结果建立了分子静电学和结晶结果之间的直接联系，提供了具有定制水合行为的分子盐的预测设计。

title: Sub-femtosecond figure-of-merit millimeter-wave switches via solution-processed MoS2 for 6G radio-frequency front-ends
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Next-generation 6G communication requires radio-frequency components capable of operating above 100 GHz with low loss, high isolation, and zero static power—requirements that challenge complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor (CMOS) and microelectromechanical systems (MEMS) technologies. Here, we report transfer-free, large-area millimeter-wave (mmWave) switches based on solution-processed MoS2. While solution-processed 2D materials are often viewed as inferior to their crystalline counterparts due to high defect densities, we demonstrate that their edge-rich morphology is, in fact, a performance enabler. These edge defects act as intrinsic templates that confine Cu-filament pathways, enabling rapid (76 ns) and low-energy switching (1.57 nJ) with > 2000 cycles and uniform zero static-power operation, as corroborated by Kelvin probe force microscopy, conductive atomic force microscopy and low-temperature studies. The resulting switches achieve an low insertion loss ( 35 dB) at 67 GHz. Notably, they exhibit a switching figure-of-merit (RON·COFF) of ~ 0.8 fs (fco ~ 187 THz), surpassing previously reported 2D switches. Importantly, by adopting an inverse-state operational scheme in a SHUNT architecture, we mitigate self-switching and achieve improved power handling (P0.1dB > 10 dBm) and linearity (IIP3 > 42.1 dBm). Finally, we demonstrate the platform’s circuit-level viability by integrating the switches into a true-time-delay and hybrid-coupled phase shifters targeting 30 GHz mmWave applications.
title_zh: 通过溶液处理的 MoS2 实现亚飞秒品质因数毫米波开关，用于 6G 射频前端
abstract_zh: 下一代 6G 通信需要能够在 100 GHz 以上运行且具有低损耗、高隔离度和零静态功耗的射频组件，这些要求对互补金属氧化物半导体 (CMOS) 和微机电系统 (MEMS) 技术提出了挑战。在这里，我们报告了基于溶液处理的 MoS2 的无转移、大面积毫米波 (mmWave) 开关。虽然由于缺陷密度高，溶液处理的二维材料通常被认为不如晶体材料，但我们证明，它们的边缘丰富的形态实际上是性能的推动者。这些边缘缺陷充当限制铜丝路径的内在模板，能够实现超过 2000 次循环的快速 (76 ns) 和低能量切换 (1.57 nJ) 以及均匀的零静态功率操作，这一点已被开尔文探针力显微镜、导电原子力显微镜和低温研究所证实。由此产生的开关在 67 GHz 下实现了低插入损耗 (35 dB)。值得注意的是，它们的开关品质因数 (RON·COFF) 约为 0.8 fs (fco ~ 187 THz)，超过了之前报道的 2D 开关。重要的是，通过在 SHUNT 架构中采用反状态操作方案，我们减轻了自切换并实现了改进的功率处理 (P0.1dB > 10 dBm) 和线性度 (IIP3 > 42.1 dBm)。最后，我们通过将开关集成到针对 30 GHz 毫米波应用的真正延时和混合耦合移相器中，展示了该平台的电路级可行性。

title: Electron-ion equilibration in superheated gold
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Electron-ion equilibration dynamics in samples driven into superheated states with multi-eV electron temperatures represent a fundamental process in nonequilibrium physics. A clear picture of the evolving ion temperature is essential for understanding the strength of the electron-ion coupling. However, direct, model-independent measurements of the ion temperature in laser-irradiated samples have remained experimentally elusive. Using inelastic X-ray scattering with meV-resolution in gold samples, the ion response to ultrafast heating by the hot electrons can be resolved, quantifying the electron-ion equilibration dynamics. We report measurements revealing a strongly enhanced energy transfer rate compared to that in weakly excited gold. Moreover, we obtain a quasi-constant electron-ion coupling at the highly elevated electron temperatures. These results place new constraints on electron-ion energy transfer in warm dense matter and establish a path toward quantitative benchmarking of models for nonequilibrium dynamics.
title_zh: 过热金中的电子离子平衡
abstract_zh: 电子温度达到多电子伏特的过热状态的样品中的电子离子平衡动力学代表了非平衡物理学的基本过程。清晰地了解不断变化的离子温度对于理解电子-离子耦合的强度至关重要。然而，对激光照射样品中离子温度的直接、独立于模型的测量在实验上仍然难以实现。在金样品中使用具有 meV 分辨率的非弹性 X 射线散射，可以解析离子对热电子超快加热的响应，从而量化电子-离子平衡动力学。我们报告的测量结果表明，与弱激发金相比，能量转移率大大提高。此外，我们在高度升高的电子温度下获得了准恒定的电子-离子耦合。这些结果对热致密物质中的电子离子能量转移提出了新的限制，并为非平衡动力学模型的定量基准建立了一条道路。

title: Unraveling the evolution of photogenerated holes from charge separation to interfacial transfer in photocatalysis
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: A photocatalytic process involves the intricate integration of complex photophysical and photochemical events that occur at nanoscale interfaces and evolve over femtoseconds to second scales. However, directly tracking the nanoscale carrier dynamics of a single photocatalyst crystal under the reaction conditions is essential but remains challenging. Here, we employed in-situ transient reflection microscopy to spatiotemporally resolve the evolution of photogenerated carriers in facet-engineered bismuth vanadate (BiVO4) photocatalyst. It is revealed that photogenerated holes undergo three sequential steps: initial ultrafast charge separation (~5 ps), hole trapping (~1.5 ns), and trap states‐mediated interfacial transfer to pre-adsorbed H2O on the surface (~19 ps). Crucially, trap states associated with oxygen lattice sites act as nanoscale relay sites that enable rapid hole injection into pre-adsorbed H2O, whereas direct valence-band hole injection is negligible. These findings provide a comprehensive mechanistic picture of photogenerated carrier dynamics across the entire photocatalytic process, directly linking nanostructure to interfacial chemistry and revealing trap states as critical mediators of efficient interfacial charge transfer.
title_zh: 揭示光催化中光生空穴从电荷分离到界面转移的演变
abstract_zh: 光催化过程涉及纳米级界面上发生的复杂光物理和光化学事件的复杂集成，并在飞秒到秒尺度上演化。然而，在反应条件下直接跟踪单个光催化剂晶体的纳米级载流子动力学是必要的，但仍然具有挑战性。在这里，我们采用原位瞬态反射显微镜来解析面工程钒酸铋（BiVO4）光催化剂中光生载流子的演化。研究表明，光生空穴经历三个连续的步骤：初始超快电荷分离（~5 ps）、空穴捕获（~1.5 ns）和陷阱态介导的界面转移到表面上预吸附的 H2O（~19 ps）。至关重要的是，与氧晶格位点相关的陷阱态充当纳米级中继位点，能够将空穴快速注入预吸附的水中，而直接的价带空穴注入可以忽略不计。这些发现提供了整个光催化过程中光生载流子动力学的全面机制图，将纳米结构与界面化学直接联系起来，并揭示了陷阱态作为有效界面电荷转移的关键介质。

title: Programming stacking order in conducting van der Waals metal–organic frameworks through ligand aggregation
source: Nature Chemistry
abstract: The physical properties of van der Waals materials are highly dependent on their stacking sequences. However, constructing layered materials with specific compositions and desired stackings is challenging. Here we show that a solvent-directed strategy enables targeted stacking in van der Waals metal–organic frameworks, an emerging class of van der Waals materials. By leveraging the tunable metastable states of conjugated ligands through various solvents, and stabilizing these states via metal–ligand coordination, we enable the inheritance of stacking patterns from ligands to van der Waals metal–organic frameworks. Notably, this strategy enables the controlled manipulation of stacking sequences and divergent charge transport regimes in two-dimensional and three-dimensional van der Waals metal–organic framework single crystals, yielding an electrical conductivity of 1,792 S cm−1. These results provide a versatile approach for designing layered materials with programmable stackings and tailored electronic properties.The alternative text for this image may have been generated using AI.
title_zh: 通过配体聚集进行范德华金属有机框架的编程堆叠顺序
abstract_zh: 范德华材料的物理性质高度依赖于它们的堆叠顺序。然而，构建具有特定成分和所需堆叠的层状材料具有挑战性。在这里，我们展示了溶剂导向策略能够在范德华金属有机框架（一类新兴的范德华材料）中进行定向堆叠。通过通过各种溶剂利用共轭配体的可调亚稳态，并通过金属配体配位稳定这些状态，我们能够继承从配体到范德华金属有机框架的堆叠模式。值得注意的是，该策略能够在二维和三维范德华金属有机框架单晶中控制堆叠序列和发散电荷传输机制，产生 1,792 S cm−1 的电导率。这些结果为设计具有可编程堆叠和定制电子特性的分层材料提供了一种通用方法。该图像的替代文本可能是使用人工智能生成的。

title: Enantioselective construction of polychiral helical compounds via dynamic kinetic resolution
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Chiral helicenes and their derivatives are valuable across diverse research fields, yet the development of helical chirality has lagged far behind that of point and axial chirality. The synthesis of polychiral or heteroatom-containing helical systems remains especially challenging because of limited starting materials and difficulties in stereochemical control. Here we computationally design a flexible oxa[4]helicenoid-ol scaffold with an optimal rotational barrier (ΔG‡ = 21.7 kcal mol−1) and enantioselective recognition ability, enabling dynamic kinetic resolution under mild conditions. This platform allows efficient access to helicenes bearing either dual helical chirality or combined helical and axial chirality, with excellent enantio-, diastereo- and E/Z selectivities. The strategy incorporates non-aromatic oxacycles, breaks conventional cyclization patterns and expands the structural diversity of helical chiral scaffolds. Density functional theory calculations elucidate the mechanistic origins of reactivity and stereoselectivity. The resulting helicenoid-quinones are readily derivatized and display promising optical properties for functional materials.
title_zh: 通过动态动力学拆分对映选择性构建多手性螺旋化合物
abstract_zh: 手性螺旋烯及其衍生物在不同的研究领域都很有价值，但螺旋手性的发展远远落后于点手性和轴向手性。由于起始材料有限且立体化学控制困难，多手性或含杂原子螺旋系统的合成仍然特别具有挑战性。在这里，我们通过计算设计了一种灵活的 oxa[4]helicenoid-ol 支架，具有最佳旋转势垒（ΔG‡ = 21.7 kcal mol−1）和对映选择性识别能力，能够在温和条件下实现动态动力学分辨率。该平台可以有效地获得具有双螺旋手性或组合螺旋和轴向手性的螺旋烯，并具有出色的对映体、非对映体和 E/Z 选择性。该策略结合了非芳香族氧杂环，打破了传统的环化模式并扩大了螺旋手性支架的结构多样性。密度泛函理论计算阐明了反应性和立体选择性的机械起源。所得的螺烯醌很容易衍生化，并显示出用于功能材料的有前途的光学特性。

title: Strong yet highly conductive liquid metal composite film constructed via friction induced in-situ synthesis
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Contact resistance is a crucial bottleneck for various applications. Liquid metal and its composites can reduce contact resistance of interfaces due to their high conductivity and deformability, yet their mechanical strength is insufficient under external forces. Here, we prepare a deformable liquid-metal-bridged nanogranular composite via friction induced in-situ synthesis, realizing low contact resistance alongside high current density of 1.5 GA/m2 and high hardness of 2.6 GPa. This remarkable performance originates from the unique structure: a high fraction ( ~ 66 vol%) of nano-sized conductive ceramic particles bridged by high-surface-tension liquid metal through metallic bonding, which is formed in situ under mechanochemical stimulation during friction. This strategy provides a route to fabricating functional liquid metal composites, shedding light into simultaneous improvement of the mechanical and electrical properties.
title_zh: 通过摩擦诱导原位合成构建坚固且高导电性的液态金属复合薄膜
abstract_zh: 接触电阻是各种应用的关键瓶颈。液态金属及其复合材料由于具有高导电性和可变形性，可以降低界面的接触电阻，但在外力作用下其机械强度不足。在这里，我们通过摩擦诱导原位合成制备了可变形液态金属桥纳米颗粒复合材料，实现了低接触电阻以及1.5 GA/m2的高电流密度和2.6 GPa的高硬度。这种卓越的性能源于独特的结构：高比例（约 66 vol%）的纳米级导电陶瓷颗粒通过金属键通过高表面张力液态金属桥接，在摩擦过程中的机械化学刺激下原位形成。该策略提供了一种制造功能性液态金属复合材料的途径，为同时提高机械和电气性能提供了线索。

title: A universal deep learning framework for empowering nanopore identification by reinforcing temporal signals
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Nanopore sensing holds transformative potential for revolutionizing protein and glycan sequencing. However, translating this potential into practical, high-fidelity identification is severely bottlenecked by the challenge of processing massive amounts of highly similar nanopore ionic-current data, spurring an urgent need for robust, AI-driven solutions. Prevailing deep learning methods suffer from two limitations: they often fail to capture the fine-grained temporal dynamics essential for distinguishing structurally similar analytes, and their generic training strategies inadequately extract weak discriminative features, thus limiting classification precision. Here, we present SEDA-Former (Signal Enhancement and Dynamic Attention Transformer), a deep temporal learning framework designed for high-resolution nanopore single-molecule identification. SEDA-Former incorporates a multi-window sliding standard-deviation method for feature enhancement, a multi-channel temporal convolutional network to mine weak features in temporal dynamics, and a progressive adaptive attention training strategy that dynamically reweights sample losses based on learning difficulty. Across a diverse set of challenging benchmark datasets, including nanopore signals of 15 glycosides, 24 ginsenosides, 8 DNA molecules, and 17 cholic acid conjugates, spanning varying levels of signal complexity, SEDA-Former consistently achieves substantially higher classification accuracy than state-of-the-art methods and demonstrates robust cross-dataset transferability. SEDA-Former provides a versatile and scalable solution to facilitate single-molecule identification in nanopore sensing.
title_zh: 一种通用深度学习框架，通过增强时间信号来增强纳米孔识别能力
abstract_zh: 纳米孔传感具有彻底改变蛋白质和聚糖测序的变革潜力。然而，由于处理大量高度相似的纳米孔离子电流数据的挑战，将这种潜力转化为实际的高保真识别受到严重瓶颈，从而迫切需要强大的、人工智能驱动的解决方案。流行的深度学习方法存在两个局限性：它们通常无法捕获区分结构相似的分析物所必需的细粒度时间动态，并且它们的通用训练策略不能充分提取弱判别性特征，从而限制了分类精度。在这里，我们提出了 SEDA-Former（信号增强和动态注意力变换器），这是一种专为高分辨率纳米孔单分子识别而设计的深度时间学习框架。 SEDA-Former 结合了用于特征增强的多窗口滑动标准差方法、用于挖掘时间动态中的弱特征的多通道时间卷积网络，以及基于学习难度动态重新加权样本损失的渐进自适应注意力训练策略。在一系列具有挑战性的基准数据集（包括 15 种糖苷、24 种人参皂苷、8 种 DNA 分子和 17 种胆酸缀合物的纳米孔信号）中，跨越不同水平的信号复杂性，SEDA-Former 始终实现了比最先进的方法更高的分类精度，并展示了强大的跨数据集可转移性。 SEDA-Former 提供了一种多功能且可扩展的解决方案

title: In situ liquid-phase TEM electrodeposition of tellurium nanostructures
source: Matter
abstract: How do tiny semiconductor wires grow in liquids? This study directly watches tellurium nanostructures form in real time, revealing how initial particles evolve into wires and complex branched shapes. It shows how growth depends on local chemistry and how adding bismuth seeds dramatically enhances formation. These insights translate into improved large-scale synthesis, highlighting how advanced microscopy can guide the design of nanomaterials for electronics and energy applications.
title_zh: 碲纳米结构的原位液相TEM电沉积
abstract_zh: 微小的半导体线如何在液体中生长？这项研究直接实时观察碲纳米结构的形成，揭示了初始粒子如何演化成电线和复杂的分支形状。它显示了生长如何取决于局部化学以及添加铋晶种如何显着增强形成。这些见解转化为改进的大规模合成，突出了先进的显微镜如何指导电子和能源应用纳米材料的设计。

title: Ductile and scalable 3 GPa steel via a hierarchical microstructural architecture
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Ultrahigh-strength steels with yield strengths exceeding 3 GPa and appreciable ductility represent a transformative frontier in materials science. Conventional strengthening approaches, such as cold-work hardening, however, inevitably trade strength for total elongation, and thus are unable to deliver ductile 3 GPa steel. Here, we present a hierarchical microstructural architecture strategy applied to a designed maraging steel (Fe-16Ni-7Mo-1.6Ti-15Co-0.1Al, wt.%) that synergizes tailored precipitations with high-temperature severe plastic deformation. The multi-misfit nano co-precipitates, a high but spatially uniform density of dislocations, and ultrafine equiaxed grains are orchestrated into a hierarchical microstructure that delocalizes stress concentrations that commonly embrittle ultrahigh-strength materials and converts brittle cleavage fracture to ductile dimpling. Remarkably, the steel demonstrates 3 GPa yield strength with 47.5% reduction in area, 7.0% tensile elongation, and fracture toughness (KIc) of 26.0 ± 0.2 MPa·m1/2, which far surpasses existing 3 GPa steels. Moreover, as it exhibits an excellent fatigue strength of 1.24 GPa at ambient temperature and a yield strength of 2 GPa at 500 °C, which is achieved in industrially viable billets, this strategy unlocks scalable damage-tolerant components for extreme environments.
title_zh: 通过分层微观结构实现延展性和可扩展的 3 GPa 钢
abstract_zh: 屈服强度超过 3 GPa 且具有显着延展性的超高强度钢代表了材料科学的变革前沿。然而，传统的强化方法，例如冷作硬化，不可避免地会以强度换取总伸长率，因此无法生产具有延展性的 3 GPa 钢材。在这里，我们提出了一种应用于设计的马氏体时效钢（Fe-16Ni-7Mo-1.6Ti-15Co-0.1Al，wt.%）的分层微观结构策略，该策略可协同定制沉淀与高温严重塑性变形。多重失配纳米共沉淀物、高但空间均匀的位错密度和超细等轴晶粒被编排成分层微观结构，使通常使超高强度材料脆化的应力集中离域，并将脆性解理断裂转化为延性凹坑。值得注意的是，该钢的屈服强度为3 GPa，断面收缩率为47.5%，拉伸伸长率为7.0%，断裂韧性（KIc）为26.0 ± 0.2 MPa·m1/2，远远超过现有的3 GPa钢。此外，由于它在环境温度下表现出 1.24 GPa 的出色疲劳强度，在 500 °C 下表现出 2 GPa 的屈服强度（这是在工业上可行的坯料中实现的），因此该策略为极端环境解锁了可扩展的耐损伤组件。

title: Fluorinated oxide shells enable sintering-free conductive liquid metal composites for flexible electronics
source: Matter
abstract: Liquid-metal composites are attractive for soft electronics, but their native oxide shells usually block electrical conduction unless mechanically ruptured. This work shows that a fluorinated polymer can chemically dope this oxide, converting it into an electronically semiconducting interface. The resulting sintering-free Janus films combine high conductivity, flexibility, and multifunctionality, reframing the liquid-metal oxide shell from an electrical barrier into a tunable semiconducting component for next-generation soft materials.
title_zh: 氟化氧化物壳可实现柔性电子产品的免烧结导电液态金属复合材料
abstract_zh: 液态金属复合材料对于软电子产品很有吸引力，但它们的原生氧化物壳通常会阻碍导电，除非发生机械破裂。这项工作表明，氟化聚合物可以化学掺杂这种氧化物，将其转化为电子半导体界面。由此产生的免烧结 Janus 薄膜结合了高导电性、灵活性和多功能性，将液态金属氧化物壳从电势垒重新构建为下一代软材料的可调谐半导体组件。

title: Nanotechnology-mediated precision delivery of mRNA
source: Nature Materials
abstract: Messenger RNA-based therapeutics have been successful in preventing and treating various diseases. Nonetheless, these therapies still face difficulties in achieving specific delivery to organs, tissues and cells, which are exacerbated by the need to overcome multilevel biological barriers and intrinsically complex physiological disease characteristics. Several approaches are being developed to overcome these challenges, including optimizing administration routes, enhancing targeting abilities and facilitating responsive release. These tailored design strategies have been utilized in applications including mRNA vaccines, protein replacement and gene editing for enhanced precision therapies. This Review discusses various heterogeneous barriers for mRNA delivery and nanocarrier-mediated mRNA precision-delivery strategies, and highlights their uses in biomedical applications. Moreover, we discuss current limitations and future perspectives to accelerate the development of precision mRNA delivery to address current clinical needs.
title_zh: 纳米技术介导的 mRNA 精确递送
abstract_zh: 基于信使RNA的疗法已成功预防和治疗多种疾病。尽管如此，这些疗法在实现对器官、组织和细胞的特异性递送方面仍然面临困难，而克服多级生物屏障和本质上复杂的生理疾病特征的需要加剧了这些困难。正在开发几种方法来克服这些挑战，包括优化给药途径、增强靶向能力和促进响应释放。这些量身定制的设计策略已应用于 mRNA 疫苗、蛋白质替代和基因编辑等领域，以增强精准治疗。本综述讨论了 mRNA 递送的各种异质障碍和纳米载体介导的 mRNA 精确递送策略，并重点介绍了它们在生物医学应用中的用途。此外，我们还讨论了当前的局限性和未来的前景，以加速精准 mRNA 递送的发展，以满足当前的临床需求。

title: Engineering a dual-antigen mRNA vaccine to restore immune control in chronic hepatitis B
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Therapeutic vaccination for chronic hepatitis B (CHB) remains challenging, as persistent immune tolerance to hepatitis B surface antigen (HBsAg) impedes anti-HBsAg seroconversion. Here we show that screening antigen combinations incorporating HBsAg identifies preS1-HBsAg as the optimal pairing. The resulting dual-antigen mRNA vaccine elicits robust hepatitis B virus (HBV)-specific immune responses in chronic HBV mouse models, leading to near-complete viral genome clearance, marked reduction of multiple HBV antigens, and serological conversion. Mechanistic analyses reveal that preS1 serves as the primary driver of HBV-specific T cell responses, while HBsAg contributes to both anti-HBsAg seroconversion and intrinsic adjuvant activity. Specifically, when delivered in mRNA form, HBsAg promotes antigen-presenting cell (APC) activation, enhances antigen presentation, and amplifies preS1-specific CD8⁺ T cell responses. Furthermore, combining the preS1-HBsAg vaccine with interferon-α (IFN-α) enhances antiviral efficacy and immune memory while maintaining a favorable safety profile. These findings establish preS1-HBsAg mRNA vaccination as a promising and translatable therapeutic strategy for functional cure of CHB.
title_zh: 设计双抗原 mRNA 疫苗以恢复慢性乙型肝炎的免疫控制
abstract_zh: 慢性乙型肝炎 (CHB) 的治疗性疫苗接种仍然具有挑战性，因为对乙型肝炎表面抗原 (HBsAg) 的持续免疫耐受会阻碍抗 HBsAg 血清转化。在这里，我们表明筛选包含 HBsAg 的抗原组合将 preS1-HBsAg 识别为最佳配对。由此产生的双抗原 mRNA 疫苗在慢性 HBV 小鼠模型中引发强烈的乙型肝炎病毒 (HBV) 特异性免疫反应，导致病毒基因组接近完全清除、多种 HBV 抗原显着减少和血清学转化。机制分析表明，preS1 是 HBV 特异性 T 细胞反应的主要驱动因素，而 HBsAg 有助于抗 HBsAg 血清转化和内在佐剂活性。具体来说，当以 mRNA 形式传递时，HBsAg 会促进抗原呈递细胞 (APC) 激活，增强抗原呈递，并放大 preS1 特异性 CD8+ T 细胞反应。此外，将 preS1-HBsAg 疫苗与干扰素-α (IFN-α) 结合可增强抗病毒功效和免疫记忆，同时保持良好的安全性。这些发现确立了 preS1-HBsAg mRNA 疫苗接种作为慢性乙型肝炎功能性治愈的一种有前途且可转化的治疗策略。

title: Multi-hazard exposure and vulnerability drive rising agricultural risk in global breadbasket regions
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Climate extremes increasingly threaten global food production, yet global multi-hazard agricultural risk assessments that jointly consider multiple hazards, crop exposure and socioeconomic vulnerability are still missing. This gap limits our ability to identify where climate shocks to croplands are most likely to translate into high agricultural risk. Here we present a global agricultural risk assessment that quantifies the exposure of croplands and ten major crop groups to heatwaves, droughts, floods and compound hot–dry events, and combines this with a vulnerability index constructed from socio-economic and institutional indicators using latent factor modelling. Using ensembles of climate and hydrological models under multiple future scenarios, we show widespread increases in multi-hazard exposure, with the strongest intensification across South Asia, Sub-Saharan Africa and major U.S. and European breadbaskets. A significant relationship between vulnerability and cropland exposure emerges in future scenarios but is absent historically, indicating a growing role for vulnerability in shaping future agricultural risk. These results demonstrate that reliably identifying future agricultural risk hotspots requires jointly accounting for multi-hazard exposure and socioeconomic vulnerability, so that adaptation efforts can be targeted to regions where intensifying extremes coincide with high vulnerability.
title_zh: 多重灾害暴露和脆弱性导致全球粮仓地区农业风险上升
abstract_zh: 极端气候日益威胁全球粮食生产，但综合考虑多种危害、作物暴露和社会经济脆弱性的全球多灾种农业风险评估仍然缺失。这一差距限制了我们识别气候对农田的冲击最有可能转化为高农业风险的能力。在此，我们提出了一项全球农业风险评估，该评估量化了农田和十个主要作物群体对热浪、干旱、洪水和复合干热事件的暴露程度，并将其与使用潜在因素模型根据社会经济和制度指标构建的脆弱性指数相结合。通过使用未来多种​​情景下的气候和水文模型集合，我们发现多种灾害的暴露程度普遍增加，其中南亚、撒哈拉以南非洲以及美国和欧洲主要粮仓的强化程度最强。脆弱性与农田暴露之间的显着关系在未来情景中出现，但在历史上并不存在，这表明脆弱性在塑造未来农业风险中的作用越来越大。这些结果表明，可靠地识别未来农业风险热点需要共同考虑多种灾害暴露和社会经济脆弱性，以便适应工作可以针对极端事件加剧且脆弱性较高的地区。

title: Dimethylsulfoniopropionate metabolism shapes microbial ecology and physiological adaptation during the austral winter in Southern Ocean sea ice and seawater
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Dimethylsulfoniopropionate (DMSP) is a highly abundant marine organosulfur compound, with important roles in stress protection and climate-cooling gases production. Polar regions, particularly seawater and sea ice interfaces, are critical yet understudied DMSP cycling hotspots. Here, we reveal up to 38-fold higher DMSP concentrations in Southern Ocean sea ice versus seawaters, identifying sea ice as a concentrated reservoir of DMSP with implications for microbial stress tolerance and sulfur recycling. Eukaryotic algae harboring DSYB and DSYE genes were predicted to dominate DMSP production, but diverse and previously unidentified bacterial producers were also detected. This elevated abundance of algal biosynthetic genes likely underpins the higher DMSP concentrations in sea ice. Notably, DMSP catabolism, particularly the dmdA demethylase and dddD and dddK lyase genes, were more abundant than biosynthesis genes. Taken together, these findings reveal the widespread metabolism for DMSP cycling and underscore a dynamic reservoir and transformation hub influencing polar climate-cooling sulfur fluxes.
title_zh: 二甲基磺基丙酸代谢塑造了南大洋海冰和海水中冬季的微生物生态和生理适应
abstract_zh: 二甲基磺基丙酸酯 (DMSP) 是一种含量丰富的海洋有机硫化合物，在应激保护和气候冷却气体生产中发挥着重要作用。极地地区，特别是海水和海冰界面，是至关重要但尚未得到充分研究的 DMSP 循环热点。在这里，我们发现南大洋海冰中的 DMSP 浓度比海水高出 38 倍，确定海冰是 DMSP 的浓缩库，对微生物胁迫耐受性和硫回收具有影响。预计携带 DSYB 和 DSYE 基因的真核藻类将主导 DMSP 的生产，但也检测到了多种先前未识别的细菌生产者。藻类生物合成基因丰度的增加可能是海冰中 DMSP 浓度较高的基础。值得注意的是，DMSP 分解代谢，特别是 dmdA 脱甲基酶、dddD 和 dddK 裂解酶基因，比生物合成基因更丰富。总而言之，这些发现揭示了 DMSP 循环的广泛代谢，并强调了影响极地气候冷却硫通量的动态储存库和转化中心。

title: Methane storage using metal–dipyrazolate frameworks
source: Nature Materials
abstract: Adsorbed natural gas storage using porous materials at ambient temperature and relatively low pressure promises to address safety and cost concerns of conventional natural gas storage technologies (liquefaction and compression), but its utility is hindered by low deliverable capacity. Flexible porous materials such as metal–organic frameworks can exhibit isotherms with the potential to afford enhanced deliverable capacity. However, prototypal flexible adsorbed natural gas sorbents, exemplified by the metal–organic framework cobalt benzenedipyrazolate, Co(bdp), suffer from hydrolytic instability and are unsuitable for pelletization. Here we report a family of metal–bipyrazolate frameworks, including hydrophobic sorbents, Zn(dpt) and Co(dpt) (H2dpt = 2,5-di(1H-pyrazol-4-yl)thiophene), that exhibit methane-induced reversible transformations between narrow-pore and large-pore phases. Zn(dpt) shows exceptionally high methane deliverable capacities for 5–35 and 5–65 bar, that is, 173 cm3 (STP) cm−3 and 225 cm3 (STP) cm−3, respectively, but, unlike Co(bdp), is hydrolytically stable. In situ structural characterization, high-pressure gas sorption and modelling provide an insight into the narrow-pore–large-pore transformations, whereas testing with 250-ml tanks reveals that Zn(dpt) retains high deliverable capacity over multiple cycles. We demonstrate a practical alternative to pelletization through a formulation approach that is probably generally suitable for flexible sorbents.
title_zh: 使用金属二吡唑框架储存甲烷
abstract_zh: 在环境温度和相对低压下使用多孔材料的吸附式天然气储存有望解决传统天然气储存技术（液化和压缩）的安全和成本问题，但其实用性因可输送能力较低而受到阻碍。金属有机框架等柔性多孔材料可以表现出等温线，并有可能提高可输送能力。然而，原型柔性吸附天然气吸附剂，例如金属有机骨架苯二吡唑钴Co(bdp)，存在水解不稳定性，不适合造粒。在这里，我们报道了一系列金属联吡唑盐框架，包括疏水性吸附剂、Zn(dpt)和Co(dpt)（H2dpt = 2,5-二（1H-吡唑-4-基）噻吩），它们表现出甲烷诱导的窄孔和大孔相之间的可逆转变。 Zn(dpt) 在 5-35 和 5-65 bar 下表现出极高的甲烷输送能力，即分别为 173 cm3 (STP) cm−3 和 225 cm3 (STP) cm−3，但与 Co(bdp) 不同，Zn(dpt) 具有水解稳定性。原位结构表征、高压气体吸附和建模提供了对窄孔-大孔转变的深入了解，而使用 250 毫升储罐进行的测试表明 Zn(dpt) 在多个循环中仍保持高可输送能力。我们通过通常适用于柔性吸附剂的配方方法展示了造粒的实用替代方案。

title: Triggering expeditious Zn2+ DMSO-bridged deposition through high-entropy, H2O-depleted hydrogel electrolyte for wide-temperature zinc batteries
source: Chem
abstract: The single H2O solvent system is the primary factor limiting Zn2+ deposition kinetics and a battery's operating temperature window. We reconstructed the Zn2+ solvation structure and H2O molecule hydrogen-bonding network by designing a multi-solvent system, thereby achieving expeditious deposition kinetics and broad temperature-range operation for the battery. Our work provides new insights into durable and high-rate aqueous batteries capable of operating in real-world, thermally fluctuating environments.
title_zh: 通过用于宽温锌电池的高熵、贫水水凝胶电解质触发快速 Zn2+ DMSO 桥接沉积
abstract_zh: 单水溶剂系统是限制 Zn2+ 沉积动力学和电池工作温度窗口的主要因素。我们通过设计多溶剂系统重建了Zn2+溶剂化结构和H2O分子氢键网络，从而实现了电池的快速沉积动力学和宽温度范围运行。我们的工作为能够在现实世界的热波动环境中运行的耐用且高倍率的水性电池提供了新的见解。

title: Amplifying tumour antigen presentations from intratumourally entrapped dendritic cells
source: Nature Nanotechnology
abstract: Antigen presentation within solid tumours presents a significant clinical challenge for systemic immune activation. Although radiotherapy or chemotherapy can generate tumour antigens by destroying tumour cells, the insufficient number and impaired function of dendritic cells within solid tumours compromises effective antigen presentation. Here we present plant-derived nanoparticles coated with nanohydroxyapatite that promote dendritic cell activation and amplify the production of dendritic-cell-derived antigen-presenting vesicles in vivo through the modulation of intracellular immune conversion and calcium signalling. The technology, termed the intratumoural generation of immunopresentation vesicles after tumour exposure, enabled a dramatic enhancement in antigen presentation within lymph nodes and, consequently, boosted systemic immune response, exhibiting superior antitumour efficacy in multiple solid tumour models when combined with radiotherapy. This strategy of amplifying immunoreactive nanovesicle production in vivo may serve as a promising immunopotentiating platform, advancing various cancer treatments.
title_zh: 放大肿瘤内捕获的树突状细胞的肿瘤抗原呈递
abstract_zh: 实体瘤内的抗原呈递对全身免疫激活提出了重大的临床挑战。尽管放疗或化疗可以通过破坏肿瘤细胞来产生肿瘤抗原，但实体瘤内树突状细胞数量不足和功能受损会影响抗原的有效呈递。在这里，我们提出了涂有纳米羟基磷灰石的植物源纳米颗粒，可通过调节细胞内免疫转化和钙信号传导，促进树突状细胞活化并在体内放大树突状细胞衍生的抗原呈递囊泡的产生。该技术被称为肿瘤暴露后在肿瘤内生成免疫呈递囊泡，能够显着增强淋巴结内的抗原呈递，从而增强全身免疫反应，与放疗结合时在多种实体瘤模型中表现出卓越的抗肿瘤功效。这种在体内放大免疫反应性纳米囊泡产生的策略可能作为一个有前途的免疫增强平台，推进各种癌症治疗。

title: Donor–Acceptor Covalent Organic Framework Enables Ambipolar Charge Storage in Aluminum‐Ion Energy Storage
source: Wiley: Advanced Energy Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  The development of sustainable high‐performance energy storage systems (ESS) beyond lithium‐ion technology has become a global priority due to lithium's geopolitical and supply‐chain constraints. Among emerging alternatives, aluminum‐ion ESS (Al‐ESS) offer remarkable advantages, including aluminum's natural abundance, high theoretical volumetric capacity, and intrinsic safety. However, progress in Al‐ESS is hindered by the scarcity of effective cathode materials capable of reversible Al‐ion storage. In this context, covalent organic frameworks (COFs) offer tunable structures and abundant redox‐active sites, which enable multi‐electron reactions and fast ion transport. However, their practical implementation is often undermined by poor electronic conductivity and limited accessibility of redox centers. Herein, 2D donor–acceptor COF integrating electron‐rich tetrakis(4‐aminophenyl)‐1,4‐phenylenediamine (TPA) and electron‐deficient naphthalenediimide (NDI) units is reported as an ambipolar cathode for Al‐ESS. The highly crystalline, microporous framework exhibits intrinsic charge‐transport pathways, enabling operation without conductive carbon‐nanotube additives. COF TPA‐NDI delivers a high specific capacity of 270 mAh/g, a specific energy of 447 Wh/kg, and exceptional cycling stability. Ex situ analyses reveal a reversible multi‐electron redox process involving amine, imine, and carbonyl sites coordinating both cationic and anionic species. These findings demonstrate that donor–acceptor engineering in COFs can yield intrinsically conductive organic cathodes, providing a new design paradigm for next‐generation Al‐ESS.
title_zh: 供体-受体共价有机框架在铝离子储能中实现双极电荷存储
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  由于锂的地缘政治和供应链限制，开发锂离子技术之外的可持续高性能储能系统（ESS）已成为全球优先事项。在新兴的替代品中，铝离子 ESS (Al-ESS) 具有显着的优势，包括铝的天然丰度、高理论体积容量和本质安全性。然而，由于缺乏能够可逆存储铝离子的有效正极材料，铝电池储能系统的进展受到阻碍。在这种情况下，共价有机框架（COF）提供可调节的结构和丰富的氧化还原活性位点，从而实现多电子反应和快速离子传输。然而，它们的实际实施常常因电子传导性差和氧化还原中心的可及性有限而受到损害。在此，集成富电子四（4-氨基苯基）-1,4-苯二胺（TPA）和缺电子萘二亚胺（NDI）单元的二维供体-受体COF被报道为Al-ESS的双极性阴极。高度结晶的微孔框架表现出内在的电荷传输路径，无需导电碳纳米管添加剂即可运行。 COF TPA-NDI 具有 270 mAh/g 的高比容量、447 Wh/kg 的比能量以及出色的循环稳定性。异位分析揭示了一个可逆的多电子氧化还原过程，涉及胺、亚胺和羰基位点协调阳离子和阴离子物种。这些发现表明，COF 中的供体-受体工程可以产生本质导电的有机

source: Wiley: Advanced Energy Materials: Table of Contents

ABSTRACT

Here, we report a catalyst‐free solid‐state Li‐O

title: Advanced Materials for Seawater Batteries toward Blue Energy Storage: Key Strategies and Future Perspectives
source: Wiley: Advanced Energy Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  Seawater batteries (SWBs) have emerged as promising aqueous energy storage systems owing to their intrinsic safety and environmental sustainability. As a naturally abundant and cost‐effective electrolyte source, seawater exhibits considerable economic benefits and potential applications. Nevertheless, the practical applications of SWBs are constrained by several challenges, including the complex multicomponent ionic composition, high corrosivity, and the narrow electrochemical stability window of seawater electrolytes. Despite these constraints, a systematic summary regarding the targeted design of functional materials specifically tailored for seawater‐based electrolytes remains lacking. In this review, we first elucidate how the physicochemical properties of seawater give rise to distinct SWB configurations and define the corresponding requirements for electrode materials. Subsequently, we provide a comprehensive discussion of rational design strategies to enhance the electrochemical performance of SWBs, focusing on the modulation of electron/ion transport pathways with electrode materials, electrolyte engineering, and interfacial regulation to achieve rapid kinetics and favorable thermodynamics in high chloride ion concentration with complex interplay. Furthermore, potential application scenarios of SWBs are outlined in accordance with the configuration prototypes. Finally, we highlight the key challenges and provide future research directions for the development of advanced materials toward high‐performance and durable SWBs.
title_zh: 面向蓝色储能的海水电池先进材料：关键策略和未来展望
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  海水电池（SWB）由于其本质安全性和环境可持续性而成为有前途的水储能系统。海水作为一种天然丰富且具有成本效益的电解质来源，具有可观的经济效益和潜在的应用前景。然而，SWB的实际应用受到一些挑战的限制，包括复杂的多组分离子组成、高腐蚀性以及海水电解质的电化学稳定性窗口窄等。尽管存在这些限制，但仍然缺乏针对专门针对海水电解质的功能材料的目标设计的系统总结。在这篇综述中，我们首先阐明了海水的物理化学性质如何产生不同的SWB配置，并定义了电极材料的相应要求。随后，我们全面讨论了增强SWB电化学性能的合理设计策略，重点关注电极材料、电解质工程和界面调节对电子/离子传输路径的调节，以在具有复杂相互作用的高氯离子浓度下实现快速动力学和有利的热力学。此外，根据配置原型概述了SWB的潜在应用场景。最后，我们强调了关键挑战，并为开发高性能和耐用 SWB 的先进材料提供了未来的研究方向。

title: Ultrathin polymer membranes with locked intrinsic microporosity for hydrocarbon fractionation
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Membrane technologies offer an energy-efficient alternative to conventional distillation for hydrocarbon fractionation, but they suffer from a trade-off between fast liquid transport and high molecular selectivity. We report a scalable approach to fabricate polymer membranes with stable interconnected pathways by locking in their intrinsic microporosity. This locking strategy reduces polymer swelling and preserves the subnanometer pore structure in hydrocarbon liquids, resulting in 10-fold higher permeance for synthetic crude oil compared with current state-of-the-art membranes. When applied to Arabian Extra Light crude oil, these membranes achieved excellent size- and class-based separation, removing 99.8% of hydrocarbons containing >15 carbon atoms and 93% of sulfur-containing components. These scalable membranes underpin processes providing rapid and selective hydrocarbon separation, enabling a more sustainable pathway toward crude oil refining.
title_zh: 用于烃分馏的具有锁定固有微孔的超薄聚合物膜
abstract_zh: 膜技术为碳氢化合物分馏的传统蒸馏提供了一种节能的替代方案，但它们面临着快速液体传输和高分子选择性之间的权衡。我们报告了一种可扩展的方法，通过锁定其固有的微孔性来制造具有稳定互连通道的聚合物膜。这种锁定策略减少了聚合物膨胀并保留了烃类液体中的亚纳米孔隙结构，与目前最先进的膜相比，合成原油的渗透率提高了 10 倍。当应用于阿拉伯超轻原油时，这些膜实现了出色的基于尺寸和类别的分离，去除了 99.8% 的含有 >15 个碳原子的碳氢化合物和 93% 的含硫成分。这些可扩展的膜支撑着提供快速和选择性碳氢化合物分离的过程，从而为原油精炼提供了更可持续的途径。

title: ScS-triggered slip on megathrust interfaces after the 2011 MW 9.0 Tohoku-Oki earthquake
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract:
We report an extraordinary observation of ground motion in Japan after the moment magnitude (
                    M
                    W
                    ) 9.0 2011 Tohoku-Oki earthquake attributed to a multiplate-interface slip event triggered by shear wave that traveled to the Earth’s core and back. The megathrust earthquake generated a strong ScS phase with a peak-to-peak amplitude exceeding 1 centimeter in Japan. Superposed on this waveform, an eastward steplike displacement of up to 5 to 6 millimeters was recorded in Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) data throughout Japan. This likely originated from slip on the megathrust interfaces triggered by the nearly simultaneous arrival of the ScS wave across Japan. Such an ScS triggering is a previously unrecognized source of seismic hazard, which can potentially (re)activate the mainshock area and the broader surrounding megathrust interfaces.
title_zh: 2011 年 MW 9.0 Tohoku-Oki 地震后 ScS 触发的巨型逆冲断层界面上的滑移
abstract_zh:
我们报告了在瞬间震级（
                    中号
                    瓦
                    ) 9.0 2011 年东北冲地震归因于剪切波传播至地心并返回而引发的多板块界面滑移事件。这次特大逆冲地震在日本产生了峰峰值超过1厘米的强烈ScS震相。叠加在该波形上，日本各地的全球导航卫星系统 (GNSS) 数据记录了高达 5 至 6 毫米的向东阶梯状位移。这可能是由于 ScS 波几乎同时到达日本而引发的巨型逆冲断层界面上的滑动。这种 SCS 触发是以前未被认识到的地震危险源，它可能（重新）激活主震区域和更广泛的周围巨型逆冲界面。

title: Scalable fabrication of COF membranes for aliphatic/aromatic separation of crude oil
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract:
Distillation has been the cornerstone of crude oil refining for more than a century, relying on boiling point differences for fractionation. Although effective, it is highly energy-intensive and lacks the precision to separate specific hydrocarbon classes. We report crystalline covalent organic framework (COF) membranes with well-defined micropores and alkyl-functionalized frameworks that combine molecular sieving with preferential affinity to enrich aliphatics. An electric field–assisted roll-to-roll process enabled scalable fabrication of continuous membranes. These COF membranes enriched aliphatics to >95% and delivered permeance orders of magnitude higher than amorphous polymers in Arabian Light crude oil. A crude oil permeance of 0.34 liters m
                    −2
                    hours
                    −1
                    bar
                    −1
                    with >90% aliphatics enrichment was achieved using industrial-standard 1812 membrane modules, demonstrating a lower energy demand than distillation.

title: Changes in wildlife activity patterns in response to war in Ukraine
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Conflict zones are inherently hazardous and inaccessible for researchers, which results in a knowledge gap about the immediate effects of armed conflicts on the environment, particularly wildlife. We used camera-trap detections to investigate the impact of armed conflict on wildlife activity patterns before, during, and after the Russian occupation of the Chornobyl Exclusion Zone (Ukraine) in 2022 and compared it to the same period in 2021. Mammal species responded to armed conflict through immediate behavioral adjustments, including reduced activity during night and on dates when armed-conflict activities intensified. Our results provide insight into wildlife’s behavioral responses to armed conflict in real time and underscore the potential of camera trapping to quantify the ecological effects of war.
title_zh: 乌克兰战争导致野生动物活动模式发生变化
abstract_zh: 冲突地区本质上是危险的，研究人员无法进入，这导致了关于武装冲突对环境、特别是野生动物的直接影响的知识空白。我们使用相机陷阱检测来调查 2022 年俄罗斯占领切尔诺贝利禁区（乌克兰）之前、期间和之后武装冲突对野生动物活动模式的影响，并将其与 2021 年同期进行比较。哺乳动物物种通过立即行为调整来应对武装冲突，包括减少夜间和武装冲突活动加剧的日期的活动。我们的研究结果提供了对野生动物对武装冲突的实时行为反应的深入了解，并强调了相机陷阱在量化战争生态影响方面的潜力。

title: Strain-induced fully coherent triphase nanoarchitecture in refractory high-entropy alloys
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Nanostructured materials have exceptional properties, yet scalable fabrication of bulk, three-dimensional, nanograined structures remains a formidable challenge. We report the self-assembly of a fully coherent, triphase nanostructure—resembling a mesocrystal—formed through solid-state phase separation in an equiatomic refractory alloy. The resulting architecture integrates three common metallic crystal structures—face-centered cubic, body-centered cubic, and hexagonal close-packed—interwoven through strain-induced phase separation and unconventional transformation pathways triggered by the separation itself. This nanostructure accommodates large atomic-size mismatches and lattice misfits while maintaining full coherency and thermal stability. The resulting material exhibits a compressive yield strength exceeding 2 gigapascals. These findings provide a method for nanostructure engineering in compositionally complex alloys through strain-induced transformation pathway engineering.
title_zh: 难熔高熵合金中应变诱导的完全共格三相纳米结构
abstract_zh: 纳米结构材料具有卓越的性能，但大块、三维、纳米颗粒结构的可扩展制造仍然是一个艰巨的挑战。我们报告了通过等原子耐火合金中的固态相分离形成的完全相干的三相纳米结构（类似于介晶）的自组装。由此产生的结构集成了三种常见的金属晶体结构——面心立方、体心立方和密排六方——通过应变诱导相分离和分离本身触发的非常规转变路径交织在一起。这种纳米结构可以适应大的原子尺寸失配和晶格失配，同时保持完全的相干性和热稳定性。所得材料的压缩屈服强度超过 2 吉帕斯卡。这些发现为通过应变诱导转变途径工程在成分复杂的合金中进行纳米结构工程提供了一种方法。

title: Viola seed pod architecture shapes sequential, force-augmented pinching
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract:
Many plants explosively launch seeds, but these natural catapults often display inefficient, unpredictable energy transfer in seed ejection. Violets (
                    Viola
                    spp.) address this problem by ejecting seeds successively with consistent propulsive force from a single pod, a strategy that requires sophisticated energy release. In this work, we show that
                    Viola
                    achieves this feat with a simple and compact structure that generates adaptive force augmentation through sequential pinching. Our biological and mathematical analyses indicate that the pod valve’s morphogeometry optimizes pinching with sufficient strength for seed ejection with limited material cost and creates a shifting force-amplifying hotspot, which allows consecutive seed ejections. We use this design principle to create autonomous zipping actuators for a range of applications, including biomedical soft machines.
title_zh: 堇菜籽荚结构形成顺序、力增强的捏合
abstract_zh:
许多植物会爆炸性地发射种子，但这些天然弹射器在种子喷射过程中通常表现出低效且不可预测的能量转移。紫罗兰（
                    中提琴
                    spp.）通过从单个豆荚中以一致的推进力连续喷射种子来解决这个问题，这种策略需要复杂的能量释放。在这项工作中，我们表明
                    中提琴
                    通过简单而紧凑的结构实现了这一壮举，该结构通过顺序挤压产生自适应力增强。我们的生物学和数学分析表明，荚阀的形态几何学优化了具有足够强度的挤压，以有限的材料成本进行种子喷射，并创建了一个移动的力放大热点，从而允许连续的种子喷射。我们利用这一设计原理来创建适用于一系列应用的自主拉链执行器，包括生物医学软机。

title: Britain’s next research choice
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Ten years ago, the Brexit referendum began the United Kingdom’s departure from the European Union (EU), forcing British science to confront a serious question: What place should the UK occupy in European research? No longer qualified to be a full-fledged member of Horizon Europe, the matter of whether to rejoin as an associate member became a totemic issue for the UK. There were serious questions around whether rejoining would be worth the money, especially if it had to pay in more funding than it could win back in grants. UK researchers, however, insisted that association was the best way to protect their access to the most prestigious and attractive funding opportunities. So, when the UK eventually associated in 2024, it was to sighs of relief. But times have changed.

title: The Lucy flyby of (52246) Donaldjohanson: A bilobed asteroid with tumbling rotation
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: The main belt asteroid (52246) Donaldjohanson (DJ) is a likely member of the Erigone asteroid family. This implies that DJ is a fragment of a larger parent body that was destroyed in a collision about 155 million years ago. We report observations taken during a flyby of DJ by the Lucy spacecraft. We found that DJ is composed of two heavily cratered lobes, connected by a smoother neck, with overall dimensions 8.8 kilometers (km) by 4.4 km by 3.1 km. The crater density is consistent with the Erigone family’s age, except for craters <0.4 km, which have been preferentially erased. DJ rotates slowly in a tumbling state, likely owing to spin-down by radiative forces. Surface spectra show iron-bearing phyllosilicates, indicating moderate aqueous evolution on the parent body.
title_zh: 露西飞越 (52246) 唐纳德约翰逊：一颗翻滚旋转的双叶小行星
abstract_zh: 主带小行星 (52246) Donaldjohanson (DJ) 可能是 Erigone 小行星家族的成员。这意味着DJ是一个更大的母体的碎片，该母体在大约1.55亿年前的一次碰撞中被摧毁。我们报告了露西号航天器飞越 DJ 期间进行的观测。我们发现 DJ 由两个布满陨石坑的裂片组成，由较光滑的颈部连接，整体尺寸为 8.8 公里 (km) x 4.4 公里 x 3.1 公里。除了<0.4 km的陨石坑已被优先抹除之外，陨石坑的密度与Erigone家族的年龄一致。 DJ 在翻滚状态下缓慢旋转，可能是由于辐射力的自旋下降所致。表面光谱显示含铁页硅酸盐，表明母体上有中等程度的水演化。
